programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Blood Sisters
programme.desc: The bullet-ridden bodies of two sisters are found in a suburban house that’s littered with mysterious clues. Joe Kenda learns that the two unassuming young mothers shared an explosive secret.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: End of Days
programme.desc: The discovery of a family home littered with corpses tasks Kenda with unspooling the paranoid obsessions of a diseased mind, and forces him to confront his greatest fear.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Powder Kegs
programme.desc: When uninvited guests crash a barrio birthday party, violence erupts—leaving Enrique Urrutia dead and potentially sparking a gang war.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Mr. Violence
programme.desc: 29yr old Chris is shot in cold blood outside a neighborhood bar. Faced with a trio of suspects, Kenda trusts his gut and makes a controversial decision.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: City Of Fear
programme.desc: When a spate of violent robberies spreads terror across the city, Kenda and the major crimes unit are called in to bring the masked gunman to justice.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: A Beautiful Shade of Death
programme.desc: When police discover the lifeless bodies of Sophia Gerardo, four children and a house cat, they suspect ritualistic mass murder. But Lt. Joe Kenda uncovers a reality far more frightening.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Nine-Year-Old Hostage
programme.desc: A hostage situation puts Sgt. Joe Kenda and his team to the test, as they try to save a family without getting shot themselves.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Secret Life
programme.desc: After Lourdes Riddle is found strangled to death in the trunk of her car, homicide detective Joe Kenda follows the trail through a twisting maze of military and cultural secrets.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: After School Special
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes when a beloved teacher is poisoned in her classroom. As doctors fight to save Barbara Lewis’ life, Lt. Joe Kenda and his team delve into her personal affairs.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bring My Baby Home
programme.desc: A four-week-old girl is kidnapped, leaving her mother in anguish and police scrambling to find her. Joe Kenda and Robert Sapp fear she’s been sold on the black market… or worse.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Knock Knock
programme.desc: A gathering of friends turns deadly when two gunmen shoot William Davis in the head. Kenda and his team dig into his past and start to suspect someone in William’s circle is lying.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My, My, Merry Christmas
programme.desc: Donald Ott is found shot to death, friends tell police he didn’t have an enemy in the world. But when Lt. Joe Kenda speaks with family, he learns of a relative who might hold the key to the mystery.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: I Will Hunt You Down
programme.desc: When two escaped inmates surface in Colorado Springs, it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda and his Fugitive Unit to bring them to justice.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Run for your Life
programme.desc: A slain body of a marathon runner is found just hours before a big race. With the help of a trusted K-9 officer, Kenda sets off to find the killer himself before he strikes again.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: John 3:16
programme.desc: A man rushes his friend to the hospital with serious gunshot wounds, reporting they were robbed by strangers. When the facts don’t add up, Lt. Joe Kenda and his team go on the hunt.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Rearview Mirror
programme.desc: When a retired military man runs over a pedestrian, it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda to determine if it was bad brakes or bad intent.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: A Prayer for the Dying
programme.desc: A mother of two is found dead in the most expensive part of Colorado Springs, leaving Lt. Joe Kenda stumped—until he looks into her personal life.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Tighten the Screws
programme.desc: When young Iraq War veteran Curtis Ashley ends up dead, Lt. Joe Kenda has to solve the slaying of a seemingly innocent victim using his keen awareness of the criminal mind.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Line Goes Dead
programme.desc: When the severed head of a wife and mother is found, Lt. Joe Kenda uses forensics and interrogation to find both her body and her killer.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Ellie & J.J. and Oscar
programme.desc: Casey Anderson, star of Expedition Wild, and wife, actress Missi Pyle, seek help with their dog’s aggression toward other dogs. A rescued stray needs help conquering his fear of children.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: The Dark Side of Chipper
programme.desc: Chipper, a 2-month old Ridgeback/Boxer mix has become progressively more aggressive and has attacked 5 dogs. Two Whippets, Rudy and Monte, are causing issues at their owner’s place of business.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Brady, Bandit, and Hootie
programme.desc: Water-obsessed Labrador; a pooch with performance anxiety; a leg chomping Chihuahua.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Miles and Maxie & Booker
programme.desc: Former Guns N’ Roses drummer, Matt Sorum need help controlling his ten month old French bulldog Miles’ aggression. And then, can Cesar clear the name of a dog who killed its sibling?

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: High Anxiety
programme.desc: A Pointer mix is fixated on pinecones, while an Australian shepherd whines every time his owner switches on the vacuum cleaner. Can Cesar help?

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Slick & Pepper
programme.desc: Slick, a rare white Puli, is full of phobias. When clients come to Christopher’s photography studio, they are greeted by Pepper’s annoying barking and heel nipping.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Spike, Jake & Nugget, and Wendel
programme.desc: A wedding date is cancelled because the dogs can't get along; a German Shepherd that's so aggressive, even the German Shepherd rescue center won't take him; Sheltie barks at everything.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Cesar's Worst Bite
programme.desc: Holly, a Labrador puppy, displays severe food aggression; a women's shelter will take a needy woman and her pit bull, Tucker, but Cesar must help the dog become less protective first.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Maxwell, Brooklyn, and Tipper
programme.desc: A spoiled Welsh Sealyham Terrier has dominance issues; an excitable English Mastiff has behavioral issues, and a territorial Tibetan Terrier needs help accepting other dogs.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Mufasa and Tucker
programme.desc: Mufasa, a South African Boerboel, became dog aggressive after being attacked as a puppy. Tucker, a teacup poodle ‘talks back’ to his owner. Can Cesar bring back the peace in this divided household?

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Run Home Roscoe!
programme.desc: When Jorge Huerta first laid eyes on him, six month old Akita Roscoe, seemed like a normal, happy puppy. Since joining the Huerta family, Roscoe has refused to go outside the family’s property.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Homeboys and Hounds
programme.desc: Cesar helps two former gang members through Homeboy Industries, an outreach program designed to break the cycle of gang violence but who have problem dogs at home.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Cricket and Hemingway & Rigby
programme.desc: Musicians Ashlee Simpson-Wentz and "Fall Out Boy" Pete Wentz, are concerned at the aggression coming from Hemingway, their English bulldog, especially since they are expecting their first child.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Delta and Dong Dong
programme.desc: Delta, a dog with aggressive behavior and a fear of men. Dong-Dong, a rescue from Taiwan, who has found solace in the living room chair of his adopted home. He won’t get up for anything.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Caged Shepherd, Tinkling Terrier
programme.desc: Troy, a German Shepherd, is aggressive towards the other animals in his home. Roxie, a Rat Terrier, is so timid that when a sudden noise disturbs her, she’ll pee on the floor.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Bull-Whipped
programme.desc: Aggressive bulldog Hugo is sent to canine rehab, and fellow bulldog Crusty must overcome his dominance issues if he's ever going to enjoy walks.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Harley, Annabelle and Memphis
programme.desc: Cesar gives three socially awkward pups some boundaries: a Lab in constant movement, a shrieking Australian Shepherd and Weimaraner with an eating disorder.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Percy & Justice
programme.desc: Percy, a West Highland White Terrier, is a handful, biting anyone who tries to touch his hindquarters. Justice, a Pit Bull, is slowly escalating toward dangerous aggression.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Buster, Holli, and Spike & Belle
programme.desc: Cesar cures Spike's depression with a new friend. An 8 year old blue heeler/Australian shepherd mix, is supposed to play the role of family alarm dog, but he does his job a little too well.

programme.title: Baywatch: Second Time Around
programme.desc: Jesse Majors, the beautiful motorcycle racer that Matt fell in love with, returns, putting strain on Matt and Summer’s relationship.

programme.title: Baywatch: The Red Knights
programme.desc: An ad hoc reunion of elite 1950s lifeguards, the "Red Knights," triggers a bar brawl and Ben's resignation. Meanwhile, Mitch helps deliver a baby when the mother goes into premature labor while swimming at the beach.

programme.title: Baywatch: Coronado Del Soul, Part 1
programme.desc: The Baywatch lifeguards travel to San Diego for a week where Summer is haunted by the hotel's legendary ghost. CJ grows attached to an orphaned dolphin at Sea World. And Mitch is stranded at sea with his brother when their sailboat capsizes.

programme.title: Baywatch: Coronado Del Soul, Part 2
programme.desc: Adrift in the ocean with his semi-conscious brother, Mitch struggles to keep himself and Buzzy alive through the long, cold night. CJ unites an orphaned dolphin with its injured mother, and Summer becomes obsessed with a passionate ghost.

programme.title: Baywatch: Mirror, Mirror
programme.desc: A beautiful woman and her plain sister compete for Mitch's affection with perilous results. Matt confronts the sudden onset of a paralyzing fear of sharks, that may in reality be a far different fear.

programme.title: Baywatch: The Falcon Manifesto
programme.desc: An investigative reporter is working on a story which details the sale of U.S. military technology by businessman Edward Falcon. The story is so incriminating that her life is put at risk. Can the Baywatch team help her get out alive?

programme.title: Baywatch: Western Exposure
programme.desc: Country and Western superstar Jessie Lee Harris takes a detour from his concert schedule and pays a visit to Baywatch in search of his estranged wife and son

programme.title: Baywatch: The Life You Save
programme.desc: When severe cutbacks put the Baywatch lifeguards’ jobs in jeopardy, Matt and Summer volunteer to guard as civilians. But can they convince the county commissioners to increase the budget before lifeguards are laid off?

programme.title: Baywatch: Trading Places
programme.desc: Stephanie Holden spends a week with the Coast Guard to help them crack a dangerous arms smuggling ring.

programme.title: Baywatch: Guys and Dolls
programme.desc: Matt doesn't know whose story to believe when he tries to reunite a runaway teen and her frantic father. Meanwhile, Stephanie must choose between Mitch and Scott.

programme.title: Baywatch: Rescue Bay
programme.desc: A Hollywood producer desperate for a new TV series idea observes a rescue on the Baywatch beach and realizes that a television series based on lifeguarding is perfect, sending Baywatch headquarters into a tizzy.

programme.title: Baywatch: Livin' on the Fault, Part 1
programme.desc: After a minor earthquake, a geological survey team arrives at Baywatch to place an underwater seismometer in the Malibu fault. Hobie has an argument with his father about his future.

programme.title: Baywatch: Livin' on the Fault, Part 2
programme.desc: Stephanie and the geological team are trapped underwater by a massive earthquake! Hobie's and Jackie's lives hang in the balance. It is up to the Baywatch team to save them before it's too late!

programme.title: Baywatch: Aftershock
programme.desc: After a recent earthquake which almost took his life, Hobie leaves California to live with his mother in Ohio. When they both show up at headquarters a few weeks later Mitch is surprised, especially when he hears the reason they are there.

programme.title: Baywatch: Baja Run
programme.desc: John Cort shows up at headquarters and convinces Mitch to compete in the Baja Run dune buggy race with him. What Mitch doesn’t know is Cort is keeping a secret which could land them both in a Mexican prison.

programme.title: Baywatch: Air Buchannon
programme.desc: Mitch has to work a 24-hour shift with Stephanie and entrusts Hobie with the responsibility of taking care of himself during that time. But Hobie becomes infatuated with an older girl and is pressured into throwing a party without Mitch’s knowledge.

programme.title: Baywatch: Shortsighted
programme.desc: Carter McKay has recently moved to Southern California to live with his father after his mother's death. When Hobie invites him to the annual father/son lifeguard competition Hobie learns the reason Carter is so embarrassed by his father.

programme.title: Baywatch: Someone to Baywatch Over Your
programme.desc: When a woman Mitch refers to as “The Mermaid” turns out to be the wife of a crime boss, an FBI agent comes to catch him before he can escape the country. Things become complicated when Mitch and the catty FBI Agent butt heads.

programme.title: Baywatch: K-Gas The Grooveyard of Solid Gold
programme.desc: The beach descends into chaos when DJ Larry "Loomin" Large announces a beach wide treasure hunt for a gold pirate doubloon worth $100,000. The Baywatch team is put on high alert when thousands of reckless treasure hunters storm the beach.
programme.sub-title: K-Gas The Grooveyard of Solid Gold

programme.title: Baywatch: Red Wind
programme.desc: When the hot Santa Ana winds move in from the desert, things start heating up on the Baywatch beach in more ways than one, as it seems like all the “weirdos” in the world have been blown to the beach.

programme.title: The Mummy Rebirth
programme.desc: When two treasure hunters uncover an Egyptian tomb, they awaken a mummy that has waited to come back and wipe humanity from the face of the Earth. It’s then a race against time as they attempt to stop the Mummy from wreaking havoc on the modern world.

programme.title: Dolls
programme.desc: Children's book author Robert and his daughter inherit a house from Robert's mother, who died in a freak accident. They find some mysterious looking dolls in the attic, and it becomes clear these creepy critters have deadly plans of their own.

programme.title: Vampyre Nation
programme.desc: In a reality where vampires walk amongst humans, Detective Derricks, an American working in Romania, discovers a series of gruesome murders. After investigating, he discovers the attackers are a new breed of vampires being driven mad by a virus.

programme.title: Nine Miles Down
programme.desc: When all contact is lost with a remote research team drilling deeper into the earth's crust than ever before, a security expert is sent to investigate

programme.title: Dead Cert
programme.desc: A gang of London gangsters get more than they bargained for when a group of businessmen make an offer to buy their club.

programme.title: Dark Oracle
programme.desc: The Dark Oracle comic returns with a vengeance and the Stone twins, Cally and Lance are more at risk than ever.

programme.title: Dark Oracle
programme.desc: The comic predicts that a red sports car will get into a terrible accident and when Cally's new crush, Emmett shows up at school with the very same car, Cally is horrified.

programme.title: Dark Oracle
programme.desc: Evil Sage has taken real Sage's place and Lance and Cally are shocked when this new, uncensored Sage devastates Lance by hooking up with Vern.

programme.title: Dark Oracle
programme.desc: Lance is playing an online role-playing game 24/7 and even Dizzy thinks he's out of control. A staged intervention fails utterly and Lance is back at the keyboard.

programme.title: Dark Oracle
programme.desc: Lance and Cally find themselves the unwitting hosts of a house party that goes completely out of control.

programme.title: Dark Oracle
programme.desc: When the comic predicts that Dizzy will become a rock star, the "Dister" surprises everyone by entering a local "Canadian Idol" type contest.

programme.title: Dark Oracle
programme.desc: When Vern decides to use his expertise in the dark arts to grow his own "familiar", Cally and Lance use the comic clues to find it before the it hatches.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Strange Event at Roman Fall
programme.desc: A wife reports her husband, a reclusive mystery writer, has fallen off a cliff. Suspicion points to her as the killer and Colonel March investigates.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Headless Hat
programme.desc: While on holiday in France, there is a murder at the docks and Colonel March is asked by a friend of the French police to assist.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Second Mona Lisa
programme.desc: The Second Mona Lisa,' painted six months after the first, is targeted by rival collectors. Colonel March is determined to reveal the truth.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: Death In Inner Space
programme.desc: A scientist seeks a way to suspend bodily life functions during space travel, and his test subject dies from lack of oxygen. Accident or foul play?

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Talking Head
programme.desc: A 12 year old boy insists his dead father told him to kill his mother's new fiancée. But did the father truly die in an accidental plane crash?

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: The Devil Sells His Soul
programme.desc: Colonel March hypnotizes five people to solve the stabbing murder of Lord Telford, while he himself portrays the murder victim.

programme.title: Colonel March of Scotland Yard: Murder Is Permanent
programme.desc: Colonel March investigates a murder in a beauty salon; there are plenty of suspects and it's up to him to single out the murderer.

programme.title: The Monster Maker: The Monster Maker
programme.desc: A mad scientist injects his enemies with an acromegaly virus, causing them to become hideously deformed.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: Man in Disguise
programme.desc: The Invisible man is investigating an international drug ring when his identity is stolen by a beautiful young woman and used to smuggle drugs.

programme.title: H.G. Wells' The Invisible Man: The Gun Runners
programme.desc: Terrorists in an Italian market gun down a family. This sparks an investigation into how the killers got the guns, which Peter is tasked with.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Wedding
programme.desc: Cookie and Melvin invite Bob and Margaret to the wedding of their goddaughter, Tiffany.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Cuckoo in the Nest
programme.desc: When Bobs old friend Clive, (who is a real drunken slob), is dumped by his wife, Bob lets him stay for a few days despite Margaret's objections?

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Gone to Seed
programme.desc: Bob decides to donate his sperm to a local sperm bank.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Driving Bob
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret have put it off for too long. They need to get their Canadian drivers' licenses.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: My Foot Hurts
programme.desc: Margaret gets her own local call-in radio show entitled My Foot Hurts. On the first day, nervous and short on callers, she mentions her favourite curry house on the air?

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Going Dutch
programme.desc: Margaret enters a contest and wins the grand prize: a cycling tour of Holland!

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: For Peter's Sake
programme.desc: Bob's brother Peter is a successful chef who has a cooking show producing in India.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Problems
programme.desc: At her clinic one-day, Margaret sees an old school chum, and invites her and her husband Matt to dinner.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Neighbours
programme.desc: In this story of neighbourhood social angst, Bob is having a complex burglar alarm installed by Graham, a sad, lonely man whose confidence is lifted immeasurably by this rare sale to Bob.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Shopping
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret, concerned at the amount they are spending in take away food and expensive local food shops, decide on an expedition to the Super Save Shopatropolis in Croydon.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Life Saver
programme.desc: Bob inadvertently saves the life of a suicidal man who then decides to become Bob's best friend.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Dental Convention
programme.desc: The time for the annual dental convention has come. Bob is not keen on going when he sees that a colleague from his student days, Bernard Wiggins, a "loud mouthed big shot", is a featured speaker.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Bob Gets Wired
programme.desc: When Margaret forgets to pay for some sprinkles at the local cake shop, she is hauled in as a shoplifter.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Book Club
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret join a book club in the hopes of expanding their tiny social horizon.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Animal Behaviour
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret arrive home from another boring evening out with dreary friends, to find that their dogs behaviour has taken a turn for the worse?

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: The Candidate
programme.desc: Margaret finds herself inadvertently running for City Council when the candidate she is supporting drops out of the race.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Gary
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret thought they knew everything about their next door neighbours, until Joyce and Trevor introduce them to their grown son, Gary.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: New Lease on Life
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret have near-death experience when Bob nearly crashes their car.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Trick or Treat
programme.desc: It's Halloween. It is also Bob father's birthday and his mother wants to celebrate by visiting his grave. Bob is not comfortable with this and tries to get out of it.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Friends for Dinner
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret have been invited to Neil and Moira's for dinner, or so they think.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: A Tale of Two Dentists
programme.desc: Bob's business is booming, and when Margaret chips a tooth Bob tells Margaret that he is unable to give her an appointment for sometime.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Mummy's Boy
programme.desc: Bobs mother is coming all the way from England to visit him.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Over-Exposed
programme.desc: Margaret accidentally picks up her neighbour's photos at the pharmacy.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Love's Labours Lost
programme.desc: While listening to the radio, Bob observes his charmless young assistant Penny, inspiring him to recite odes about youth and innocence.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Outward Bound
programme.desc: Bob joins his male colleagues on a canoe trip to a provincial park.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Bob's Burglary
programme.desc: While Bob and Margaret are sleeping, the local criminals, Beany and Boney clear their house - TV, video, microwave and electric toothbrush all go.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: A Patient Dies in Bob's Chair
programme.desc: When a patient dies of natural causes while in Bob's surgery, the local papers pick up the story?
programme.sub-title: A Patient Dies in Bob's Chair

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Jury Duty
programme.desc: Margaret gets called to Jury Duty but Bob has planned a holiday for them and begs her to get herself excused.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Age Before Beauty
programme.desc: Margaret gets a new hairstyle but Bob doesn't even notice.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: A Bob or Two
programme.desc: Bob buys an inexpensive painting from the neighbours at a junk sale (mostly motivated by pity since these neighbours have fallen on hard times) and hangs it in his surgery to brighten things up?

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: On Location
programme.desc: A film crew sets up shop on Bob and Margaret's street, giving them a small and unsavory taste of fame and fortune.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Stranded in Toronto
programme.desc: When Bob and Margaret take a trip to New York, their flight is re-routed to Toronto due to a storm.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: A Very Fishy Christmas
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret experience a truly Canadian Christmas.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Margaret Gets a Job
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret have made the big move to Canada.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Strangers in a Strange Land
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret are mortified to discover that while they have been cooped up at Cookie and Melvin's house in Mississauga Ontario, their dogs have been left unattended by Penny, Bob's unreliable receptionist.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Undefined Border
programme.desc: Bob and Margaret go cross-border shopping in the United States.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Fish at the Bat
programme.desc: Bob gets cajoled into joining his office softball team.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: Til Death Do Us
programme.desc: Bob gets conned into buying a cemetery plot for Margaret as a surprise 15th wedding anniversary gift.

programme.title: Bob and Margaret: I, Bob
programme.desc: When an efficiency expert comes to assess the Inner City Dental Clinic, Bob gets side shifted out of a job.

programme.title: On the Case: Tip 1960
programme.desc: 19 year old Katie Poirier was working the night shift at a Convenience store when she was violently kidnapped. The abduction was captured on videotape but the images were not clear enough to identify her attacker.

programme.title: On the Case: At Death's Door
programme.desc: After a single mother is viciously attacked and left for dead, she still manages to help police track down her assailant.

programme.title: On the Case: Hidden by Fire
programme.desc: When firefighters respond to a raging house fire they discover the blaze was just the cover up for a vicious murder.

programme.title: On the Case: Justice Never Quits
programme.desc: Mary-Jane Marquardt, mother and wife from Chippewa, Wisconsin, was found stabbed to death in her own home. With Mary-Jane's son also missing, the detectives couldn't help but wonder if his disappearance was connected to the murder.

programme.title: On the Case: A Predator in Deerfield
programme.desc: March 17, 1986 in Deerfield Beach, Florida 5- year-old Stacy Savage happily bounded up the street to the spot where her mother Angela Savage and her little brother met her after school. But when Stacy got there, her mother was nowhere to be found

programme.title: On the Case: Circled by Vultures
programme.desc: A tourist takes a photo of vultures in Joshua Tree National Park and inadvertently discovers a gruesome homicide.

programme.title: On the Case: Hanging By A Thread
programme.desc: Hillsborough County Florida is in the midst of a horrifying crime spree. Young women are turning up dead every week. Can one teen age girl's bravery bring an end to a vicious killer's reign of terror?

programme.title: On the Case: Murder Ordained?
programme.desc: When a young minister's wife is found dead, it appears to be a tragic accident. But then, another member of the congregation is murdered. Police begin to wonder if its just a coincidence or a calculated plot.

programme.title: On the Case: Little Lamb
programme.desc: Investigators must identify a gunman who murdered a young mother but spared her child asleep in her car seat in the back of her minivan.

programme.title: On the Case: A Slip of Fate
programme.desc: A woman is found clinging to the guardrail of a steep embankment. She tells police a harrowing story; two men had attacked her and her husband at gunpoint and now he is missing. Was it a robbery gone wrong or part of a far more sinister plot?

programme.title: On the Case: Trail of a Monster
programme.desc: The murder of respected health care aide sends a chill through her community. When the investigation reveals several shockingly similar crimes, police realize they've uncovered the trail of a monster.

programme.title: On the Case: A Murder in Pelham
programme.desc: A daughter spends 25 years pursuing the truth behind her mother's mysterious murder.

programme.title: On the Case: Tangled Web
programme.desc: A romantic Valentine's Day rendezvous ends in murder.

programme.title: On the Case: Murder at Sunrise
programme.desc: A beautiful young mother is found murdered while walking her dogs. Investigators suspect her killer is someone she knew. Twenty-six years latter police make an arrest but is he the right man?

programme.title: On the Case: Solemn Vows
programme.desc: A mother finds her daughter savagely murdered inside their family owned wedding chapel.

programme.title: On the Case: Campus Killer
programme.desc: When a young girl goes missing from her university campus, her mother is forced to lead an investigation for the truth. Can she find her precious daughter before it's too late?

programme.title: On the Case: Terror in Bedford Park
programme.desc: A young woman is found stabbed to death locked inside a locker at a storage facility.

programme.title: On the Case: Golden Promises Broken
programme.desc: High school sweethearts disappear during a picnic and investigators spend years chasing false leads.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S1 E22 - Family Ties
programme.desc: With death approaching in the form of Peacekeeper search parties, those aboard Moya say their final goodbyes, and share a last feast together.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E1 - Mind The Baby
programme.desc: Crichton, Aeryn and D'argo are stranded in an asteroid field while Scorpius searches for them. Their safety depends on Crais, who is nearby in Talyn.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S2 E1 - Mind The Baby

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S2 E2 - Vitas Mortis
programme.desc: D'Argo takes part in a sacred ritual that helps an old Luxan, an Orican, to survive.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Dinner With Dana
programme.desc: Things heat up between Johnny Smith and Dana Bright, the news reporter who's been hounding him since he woke up, during a pretend date she plans to use as the basis for a cover story.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Shaman
programme.desc: Johnny Smith's visions reach across time when he joins forces with a psychic Native American Shaman from centuries past to avert a major disaster.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Destiny
programme.desc: When Johnny Smith's prediction of a tragic fire comes true, the incident brings him unwanted media coverage, as well as the attention of Greg Stillson, a very ambitious young candidate for congress.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Valley of the Shadow
programme.desc: The season premiere finds Johnny still shaken by his Armagedon visions and growing increasingly obsessed with Stillson whom he's secretly investigating.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Descent
programme.desc: Johnny struggles to rescue four teens trapped in a collapsing mine, all the while reliving - and in some way trying to redeem - sins from his family's past.

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: Peer Pressure (REDUX)
programme.desc: Dante brings a captive fugitive aboard, along with her teenage son, Ajit. Percy and Ajit's immediate attraction sparks a conflict which endangers everyone.

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: Frozen (REDUX)
programme.desc: Dante must decide whether to save a scientist and his son from the clutches of the Raiders, or use them as a bargaining chip to find his own child.

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: Past Lives (REDUX)
programme.desc: Dante's crew capture an alleged murderer, wanted by The Orchard, who turns out to be Luc's ex-husband. Luc is left with only terrible options.

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: Family Values (REDUX)
programme.desc: When Dante and Luc capture a Raider, Dante is caught between his sense of justice and his desire for vengeance.

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: Cell Game (REDUX)
programme.desc: When Dante loses Percy to corrupt Oberon police, he must work out a dangerous deal to free Percy, while she fights for her life in prison.

programme.title: Black Hole High: Shrink
programme.desc: Josie laments her short height, but is then shrunk to a far smaller size. She uses an answer machine message to prevent Victor from selling Pearadyne Labs, and learns of a strange operation taking place on the school.

programme.title: Black Hole High: Wormhole 2
programme.desc: Josie gets sucked into a vortex, sending her three hours into the past. If she doesn't enter the vortex when it is time, she will be stuck in an alternate dimension. Meanwhile, Josie's mother thinks about cooperating with Victor.

programme.title: Black Hole High: Pheromones
programme.desc: When Madison runs for President of the Student Council, Josie runs against her for the sole purpose of defeating her. Josie promises to change the system of grading, while Madison uses pheromones to capture everyone under her control.

programme.title: Black Hole High: Cold
programme.desc: Marshall is goes to school with a cold, and his sickness spreads via wireless computer network.

programme.title: Black Hole High: Genome
programme.desc: A class DNA project goes awry when Lucas' DNA is altered and his personality changes from shy and nervous to absolutely fearless, but lacking self-control. His friends must save him from Stu Kubiak, who calls a fight with him.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Last Knight
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel go to Paris, France after the Sword of Jacques de Molay, Grand Master of the Knights Templar. Rival relic hunter Rita Rosellini is also after the sword.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Possessed
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel are in Brussels, Belgium in search of the sacred sundial of Zeus in order to stop the Vampires.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: Memories of Montmartre
programme.desc: Sydney and Nigel head to Paris, France to find a stolen locket, so they can clear Sydney's dead grandmother of the charges.

programme.title: Relic Hunter: The Put Back
programme.desc: Kuba, Africa 100 AD: Worshippers of Woote curse his idol to protect it. 2000: Ross Crawford comes to Sydney, because he took the idol and the curse has accelerated his aging.

programme.title: Murder Masterminds: The Farmer's Wife
programme.desc: When Shirley Carter was found murdered in her farmhouse kitchen, her abusive husband Bill was considered a prime suspect. But her husband pointed the finger at someone else - his son Jason. It was up to the jury to decide who to believe.

programme.title: Murder Masterminds: Murder On The Gulf Coast
programme.desc: When the body of former policewoman Taylor Wright was discovered buried on a remote Pensacola farm, detectives had a lineup of suspects to investigate, including her ex-husband from whom Taylor stole $100,000, and her new live-in girlfriend Casandra.

programme.title: Murder Masterminds: The Doctor Is Dead
programme.desc: The beautiful, highly popular Dr Teresa Sievers was a rising social media star when she was found bludgeoned to death in her Bonita Springs, Florida kitchen. It was the third suspicious death of a holistic doctor in recent weeks in the area.

programme.title: Murder Masterminds: Cheerleader On Trial
programme.desc: Ashamed of a pregnancy out of wedlock and fearful of her parents' reaction, high school senior Skylar Richardson told no one of her condition. But when a newborn’s body was found buried in the family’s backyard, Skylar was charged with murder.

programme.title: Murder Masterminds: Killing Momma
programme.desc: The story of Gypsy Lee Blanchard. Confined to a wheelchair and lavished with gifts from charities, everything changed when her mother was found dead and Gypsy vanished.

programme.title: Murder Masterminds: Murder In The Barnyard
programme.desc: A hog farmer claims his wife fell on a four-pronged rake and died - but there is a hole in his story and his wife's body holds the clue.

programme.title: Murder Masterminds: Murder In Wisconsin Field
programme.desc: When Nicole, a young teacher, was found shot to death in a Wisconsin farm field, police arrested her live-in boyfriend who had waited 18 hours to report her missing. But later, a stranger Nicole met at a concert in a local bar became a prime suspect.

programme.title: Murder Masterminds: Murder Under A Blue Moon
programme.desc: Each episode of Murder Masterminds immerses viewers in the emotions and mystery of a homicide, using interviews, recreations and dramatic police dash/body cam videos to tell a tale of murder and deception.

programme.title: Murder Masterminds: Murder In The Kentucky Hills
programme.desc: Shayna Hubers called 911 to report that she had killed her boyfriend in self-defense after he attacked her. But investigators soon learned he was planning a date with another woman, and alleged Shayna killed him in a jealous rage.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Dale Cregan
programme.desc: It's 2012 and drug dealer Dale Cregan murders police officers Nicola Hughes and Fiona Bone. Dermot Murnaghan investigates.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Angus Sinclair
programme.desc: Angus Sinclair, called Scotland's worst serial killer, is linked to the 1977 murders of two girls in Edinburgh.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: The Moors Murders
programme.desc: An investigation into the Moors Murderers, Myra Hindley and Ian Brady, with interviews with the family of Keith Bennett.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Suzy Lamplugh
programme.desc: A look at the case of estate agent Suzy Lamplugh, who showed a client around a house in Fulham in July 1986 and was never seen again. Dermot Murnaghan hosts.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Wrongly Released
programme.desc: This special episode shines a light on criminals who have been brought to justice for one crime only to be released to commit further terrible acts.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Rochdale Groomers
programme.desc: Rochdale Groomers: Documentary examining the sex abuse scandal which occurred in the North of England and appeared to go undetected for quite some time.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Joanne Dennehy
programme.desc: Dermot Murnaghan returns to uncover the truth behind the horrific crimes of Peterborough serial killer Joanna Dennehy.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Keith Blakelock
programme.desc: In 1985, PC Keith Blakelock was murdered during a riot on a housing estate in London, triggered after a black woman died of heart failure during a house search. Nobody has been brought to justice for his murder, despite three investigations.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain: Peter Tobin
programme.desc: Peter Tobin is one of the most notorious serial killers in the UK. From 1991–2006 he raped and murdered three young girls; Dinah McNicol, Vicky Hamilton and Angelika Kluk. Yet even prior to these horrific murders he had a history of violence.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Bodies Of Evidence: Roger Severs
programme.desc: In November 1993, Derek and Eileen Severs disappeared without a word. When police spoke to their son, Roger, he insisted they were on holiday. However, there was no evidence of this apparent trip, and Roger was soon arrested on suspicion of murder.

programme.title: Robbie Coltrane's Critical Evidence: Resolution To Kill: Colin Ireland
programme.desc: In the summer of 1993 a serial killer stalked London. The Metropolitan Police investigated a bizarre murder in which a man was found naked on his bed with a dead cat draped over him. He’d been strangled and his flat had been wiped of evidence.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 8
programme.desc: Take a fresh look at some classic alien encounters, UFOs and abductions, and discover several new stories.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 7
programme.desc: Experts open previously off-limits files in a bid to answer some of the most mysterious questions surrounding UFOs and extra-terrestrial life.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 6
programme.desc: Experts open previously off-limits files in a bid to answer some of the most mysterious questions surrounding UFOs and extra-terrestrial life.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 11
programme.desc: In 2011, a vault of US government files about UFO sightings and alien activity was released. This series investigates these documents and re-examines key evidence about UFOs, alien abductions and government cover-ups.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 10
programme.desc: In 2011, a vault of US government files about UFO sightings and alien activity was released. This series investigates these documents and re-examines key evidence about UFOs, alien abductions and government cover-ups.

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 1
programme.desc: Series investigating compelling UFO and alien cases by opening previously off-limits secret files. Does the mysterious Blue Planet Project hold the answers?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 9
programme.desc: We have always been told that mankind enjoys free will. Is this really true or have aliens created the means for controlling humanity?

programme.title: Alien Files Unsealed: Episode 5
programme.desc: A look at the possibility that life began on Mars and travelled to Earth. Plus, if aliens exist, what plans do they have in store for us? Experts investigate.

programme.title: Strangest Things: Scrab, The Ark And The Rock, The
programme.desc: Was an ancient glass scarab in Tutankhamun’s tomb created by forces that are literally out of this world? Does a 4,000-year-old tablet really have building instructions for Noah’s Ark a thousand years before the Bible is written?
programme.sub-title: Scrab, The Ark And The Rock, The

programme.title: Strangest Things: Romans, Lost Treasure And A Leech
programme.desc: What is the purpose of the strange bronze Roman dodecahedrons that have baffled archaeologists for centuries? Is a Middle Eastern metal scroll a guide to buried treasure? Is a machine powered by bloodsucking leeches the original weather app?
programme.sub-title: Romans, Lost Treasure And A Leech

programme.title: Strangest Things: The Battery, The Screaming Mummy And The Medieval Iron Hand
programme.desc: Is a 2,000-year-old weathered jar discovered on an Iraqi excavation really the world’s oldest battery? Why is a 3,000-year-old Egyptian mummy screaming? Did a metal hand from 15th century Germany belong to some kind of medieval Iron Man?
programme.sub-title: The Battery, The Screaming Mummy And The Medieval Iron Hand

programme.title: Strangest Things: The Ancient Computer, The Pigeon And The Roman Nanotechnology,
programme.desc: Is a corroded lump of bronze found on the sea floor really a 2,000-year-old computer? Was a thousand-pound World War Two bomb really piloted by a pigeon? What is the sub-atomic secret of a Roman colour-changing glass cup?
programme.sub-title: The Ancient Computer, The Pigeon And The Roman Nanotechnology,

programme.title: Strangest Things: German Codes, Egyptian Helicopters And The Future Machine
programme.desc: Is a device that looks like a typewriter in a wooden box really one of the most dangerous weapons in history? Why is there a modern helicopter carved in an ancient Egyptian temple? Can an 800-year-old Arabic machine really calculate your future?
programme.sub-title: German Codes, Egyptian Helicopters And The Future Machine

programme.title: Strangest Things: The Viking Coin, The Ancient Disk And The Dead Girl That Saved A Million Lives
programme.desc: Can a shred of metal dug up on a thousand-year-old native American site really be Viking? Is a strange fired clay disc discovered on Crete really the product of Europe’s earliest civilisation, or is it a fake?
programme.sub-title: The Viking Coin, The Ancient Disk And The Dead Girl That Saved A Million Lives

programme.title: Strangest Things: The Ice Age Shaman, The Bronze Age Sky And The Steampunk Lightbulb
programme.desc: Is the 11,000-year-old heavily worked skull of a deer, complete with eye holes, evidence of the earliest known religion? Is a Bronze Age disk covered in gold decoration the earliest representation of the cosmos?
programme.sub-title: The Ice Age Shaman, The Bronze Age Sky And The Steampunk Lightbulb

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Inca Child Sacrifice
programme.desc: Merging advanced scanning technology and scientific research, the series investigates the curiosities that have been lost for millennia, or never seen before, exploring how and why they ended up in the most desolate and distant corners of the planet.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Revenge Of The Ice Mummy
programme.desc: Canadian divers spot an object that may solve a Cold War nuclear mystery. A mummified businessman is found atop Mexico’s highest peak. In Iceland, a cave said to be home to a fire giant is investigated. Mummified penguins are found in Antarctica.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Mystery Of The Arctic Shipwreck
programme.desc: A Russian mystery involving the deaths of nine hikers may finally be solved. A legendary ship is pulled from icy Arctic waters. In Antarctica, a melting glacier could cause a global disaster. Russian researchers find a strange arrangement of bones.

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice: Mystery Of Glacier Mummy
programme.desc: Mountain climbers in California find the body of a U.S. Army soldier. In Alaska, strange bundles of canvas and wood high up on a mountain are discovered. Volcanic glass is found in an unexpected place. A vital WWII weather station is uncovered.

programme.desc: Alex escorts a pretty socialite to a dance at her country club.

programme.title: Family Ties: Death Of A Grocer

programme.desc: Mallory is horrified and confused when a close family friend and older business associate of her father makes a pass at her.

programme.desc: When popular sorority girl Sherry Marshall befriends Mallory to get close to Alex, Mallory brings them together in hopes of joining Pi Nu but her plan backfires.

programme.title: Family Ties: The Fugitive, Part 1
programme.desc: Elyse's younger brother and Alex's idol, Ned, makes a surprise visit. However, everyone is puzzled by the go-getter corporate executive's suspicious behavior.

programme.desc: Alex amasses a bundle by playing the stock market on paper for his economics class, and courts disaster by secretly investing his father's money.

programme.desc: Moesha saves a suicidal friend, while Dorian pretends to be religious to impress a cute girl.

programme.desc: Hakeem asks Moesha to move in with him, and Dorian’s past comes back to haunt him.

programme.desc: The meaning of Moesha’s and Kim’s friendship is tested when they both try out for the cheerleading team -- and Kim gets picked, and Moesha doesn’t.

programme.desc: Moesha and her father coach Hakeem on how to get a job. As a result, the owner of a sporting goods store (Bo Jackson) hires him.

programme.desc: Moesha is now officially allowed to date because she is turning sixteen, although Frank remains extremely reluctant.

programme.title: Moesha: Reunion
programme.desc: Moesha’s father arranges a reunion of Moesha’s childhood playgroup (his motive is to sell Saturns).

programme.desc: When Moesha borrows money from Frank to buy a mother’s day present for Dee, but only gives Dee socks, Frank is upset.

programme.desc: Moesha gets her first taste of independence when she gets a job and earns her own money.

programme.title: Moesha: Niece

programme.desc: Hakeem gets a girlfriend, making both Kim and (surprisingly) Moesha jealous. They conspire to break up the romance, resulting in a heart broken Hakeem.

programme.desc: Mo cries the lovesick blues on a phone-in radio show. The DJ, feeling sorry for Mo, gives her four free tickets to an upcoming concert.

programme.title: Royal Upstairs Downstairs
programme.desc: Today’s visit to Harewood House in Yorkshire was made in 1835, two years before she became Queen, having learnt she would inherit the thrown four years earlier.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Kent and Sussex
programme.desc: This week Phil and Kirstie are concentrating their efforts in Kent and Sussex.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Episode 16
programme.desc: With the market constantly shifting, there's no such thing as a "simple search" anymore. Our dynamic duo will have to work harder than ever before to make sure they come up with the goods.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Exeter
programme.desc: The presenters search for properties near Exeter. Kirstie Allsopp helps a couple spend their £600,000 budget on a rural home with plenty of space and an annexe for wife Nancy's mother.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Merseyside
programme.desc: Gary Wakefield and wife Nicky don't try to disguise themselves-they admit they are the fussiest house-hunters in the country.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Warwickshire
programme.desc: It's like Doctor Dolittle meets Lawrence of Arabia as Kirstie and Phil help the camel-racing Fossett clan relocate their ever-expanding menagerie of children and wild beasts.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: South East London
programme.desc: From a design duo looking for their next project to a couple who are finally ready to put down roots and buy a home together this search takes Phil and Kirstie to South East London and on a journey like no other!

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Edinburgh Revisit
programme.desc: A year ago, Kirstie and I were pounding the streets of Edinburgh. I've come back to see if all the hard work was worth it.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: London Southside
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil are searching in South London with three essential workers who need all the help they can get. They're all new to the area, have very modest budgets, and want to find their dream first homes.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: North Surrey
programme.desc: This week Kirstie and Phil take charge of property searches for 2 couples who hope to relocate to the leafy streets of beautiful Surrey –one of the most expensive counties in the country.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Norwich
programme.desc: This week Kirstie and Phil are called to the rescue of faint-hearted first time buyers, Helen and Paul. Scared off by serious-sounding surveys this hapless pair have loved and lost their dream home no less than three times in the last twelve months.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location: Midlothian
programme.desc: Professional rugby player Matt and girlfriend Amy have been giving the property market a try for over a year but so far, have failed to score.

programme.title: Great British Menu: Scotland Fish
programme.desc: Scottish chefs - Alan Murchison, Colin Buchan, and Mark Greenaway cook their fish course, but which one will prevail? Will it be Grilled Mackerel with beetroot meringues and horseradish ice cream; Crab 'cannelloni' or poached halibut with squid ink?

programme.title: Great British Menu: Scotland Main

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Michael B. Jordan
programme.desc: Actor Michael B. Jordan joins Grylls in Wales where they start their journey by dropping into rough waters off the coast before making their way up the coast and to the top of the mountains for their exit.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Kate Winslett
programme.desc: Acclaimed movie star Kate Winslet takes a role like never before, as Bear paramotors them both to the top of the Snowdonia Mountains in Wales.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Tamron Hall
programme.desc: Tamron Hall's tenacious personality shines through as Bear pushes her to her limits.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Courtney Cox
programme.desc: Actress Courteney Cox joins Bear to challenge herself into sharp edged discomfort amidst the jagged peaks and descending cliffs on the windswept coast of Ireland.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Sterling K. Brown
programme.desc: Actor Sterling K. Brown joins Bear in the high mountains of Colorado, where they battle plummeting temperatures while descending a sheer rock face, track an elusive deer and rappel down a waterfall.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Shaquille O'Neal
programme.desc: Bear and NBA legend Shaquille O'Neal are lifted from a freight train via helicopter and whisked away to a dense forest in the remote Adirondacks; they face blood-sucking leeches, and a 200-foot rock face as they search for their exit.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Deon Sanders
programme.desc: Bear Grylls takes NFL hall of famer Deion Sanders to the mesas and canyons of Utah for his first ever camping trip.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Nick Jonas
programme.desc: Renowned survivalist Bear Grylls is accompanied by singer Nick Jonas on another one of his journeys into the wilderness.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Don Cheadle
programme.desc: Actor Don Cheadle joins Bear on a trek through the mountains of New England, which includes crossing a raging river and a climb to a towering railroad bridge. Bear considers a porcupine carcass for dinner.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Channing Tatum
programme.desc: Channing Tatum hikes, explores and climbs during his expedition to Yosemite National Park. The pair begin with a helicopter ride, move through dense forest, then eat some dangerous food.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Julianne Hough
programme.desc: Bear and actress Julianne Hough navigate the unforgiving terrain and wild animals of the African savanna; Julianne talks about her adolescence and her determination to succeed.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Lindsey Vonn
programme.desc: Bear and Olympic gold medallist Lindsey Vonn take a speedboat trip, then swim to shore and make their way along a rugged coastline; after traversing a deep chasm, they collect a dinner of sea urchins.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Lena Headey
programme.desc: Lena Headey and Bear journey through Spain's Iberian Peninsula; they rappel from a towering ridge, dine on bone marrow from a goat carcass and cross a lake using a makeshift raft during an unexpected storm; Lena details her life and rise to stardom.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Roger Federer
programme.desc: Bear takes one of the best athletes of all time, Roger Federer, on a daring adventure through the Swiss Alps as they attempt to navigate the tough terrain. They descend a frozen waterfall and use tennis rackets as snowshoes.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, James Marsden
programme.desc: X-man' James Marsden joins Bear on an adventure into the heart Rattle Snake Canyon in Utah, where they helicopter on to one of the highest arches in the area.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Drew Brees
programme.desc: Bear Grylls ventures deep into Panama's Camino de Cruces jungle with Super Bowl winning quarterback Drew Brees, exploring caves and wrestling a six-foot crocodile.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Ed Helms
programme.desc: Actor Ed Helms faces sheer cliffs, crumbling rock and a cringeworthy dinner menu while atop Colorado mountains; Helms discusses the road to his career in comedy.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Joseph Gordon-Levitt
programme.desc: Bear and Joseph Gordon-Levitt navigate Kenya's unyielding terrain; Joseph and Bear navigate a perilous rappel, milk a camel for hydration, ascend a massive rock dome and battle a crocodile for dinner; Joseph talks about his family and rise to fame.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Zac Efron
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Zac Efron heads into the Appalachian wilderness of the Catskill Mountains in New York. They parachute into the woods, rappel down cliffs and search for shelter.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Mel B
programme.desc: Spice Girl Mel B joins Bear on the two hundred foot cliffs of the Welsh coastline, where a final descent sends Mel into breakdown mode; Bear is stung by a jellyfish, forcing Mel to practice some first aid skills.
