programme.title: Garfield & Friends: Garfield and Friends
programme.desc: Floyd wants to do the show but Jon’s is the scheduled guest.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: China - Welcome, Cousin Riff
programme.desc: BJ is waiting for a very special letter from his pen pal in China. The letter reveals that his pen pal is coming for a visit. With the help of friends in the park, BJ hurries to get the park ready.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: My Family and Me
programme.desc: The children are invited to a family picnic in the park, but don't know who invited them. The invitations instruct them to bring a family treasure, so each child has something special with them. Barney helps lead a discussion about families.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: It's Showtime!
programme.desc: Barney, BJ and the kids spend the day preparing for a performance for their friends in the park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When several sports balls suddenly disappear without a trace, it’s detective BJ to the rescue as he dons trenchcoat and fedora.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop's blankey seems to be getting smaller. But Barney shows her that Baby Bop is growing. Barney and his friends help Riff see the dentist is nothing to be afraid of.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Up, Down, and Around!
programme.desc: When Tony brings his kite to the park to show his friends, it accidentally blows into the branches of a tree! While waiting for a breeze to blow the kite down, Barney, Baby Bop and the kids play games about "up" and "down."

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Puppy Love
programme.desc: Barney and the kids help Mr. Boyd prepare his dog Bingo for a trip to the veterinarian for a check, while learning lessons about caring for dogs at the same time. Meanwhile, BJ is searching for his missing baseball, which he suspects was buried by Bingo.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Who's Your Neighbor?
programme.desc: Through pretend play, Barney and the children learn about their community and the people that help them live safely and happily there.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When she finds out that Daniel is going on a trip the next day, Baby Bop wants to go on a trip as well. Everyone decides to pretend to travel the same way Daniel will travel.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Bonjour Barney!
programme.desc: Emma wants to paint an award-winning painting for the "Art In The Park Show," but she is just isn't satisfied with her artwork. Barney takes her to France to learn how to paint from his friend Pierre.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop isn’t satisfied with the things she can do. When a wheelchair-bound child is unintentionally neglected by his friends, Barney steps in to help.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Cousin Riff is moving to town. Barney encourages everyone to put on a special show.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: The Emperor's Contest - The Whole Truth
programme.desc: Everyone is excited about a fishing contest that is being held in the park; everyone except Ryan, who doesn't want to follow the contest rules. When Ryan is tempted not to follow the rules, Barney tells a story called "The Emperor's Contest."
programme.sub-title: The Emperor's Contest - The Whole Truth

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Spring Into Fun!
programme.desc: It's a rainy spring day, and the children can be found inside painting and creating. Barney arrives, explains the differences amongst the seasons, and suggests playing outside in the rain. The rain is soon replaced by sunshine and a rainbow.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A World of Friends
programme.desc: The children learn about many different countries while experiencing an "International Fair" on the playground.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop forgets to say "please" and "thank you". Riff shares his dream of becoming an inventor.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: The Big Garden - Get Happy
programme.desc: Baby Bop wants Barney, BJ and the kids to play with her instead of working in their garden. They promise to play with her as soon as they finish. Baby Bop can't wait, and tries many ways to get them to come play with her now, none of which work.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Sharing Is Caring!
programme.desc: The children bring toys to donate to Mr. Boyd's toy drive. Baby Bop and BJ arrive and after some convincing, Baby Bop learns about the merits of sharing.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: A Wonderful World of Colors and Shapes
programme.desc: Picture this! When Barney shows off his new painting, his friends are inspired to create their own art show. Discovering how to create new colors and draw shapes, Barney and his friends put on a super-dee-duper art show
programme.sub-title: A Wonderful World of Colors and Shapes

programme.title: Barney and Friends: This Way In, This Way Out!
programme.desc: Angela is in the park to release her turtle after observing him with her classmates in school. Barney and the children discuss the meaning of in and out after observing the turtle going in and out of his shell.
programme.sub-title: This Way In, This Way Out!

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Here Kitty, Kitty
programme.desc: When Miss Jo loses her cat, Barney and the children spend the day helping her find it. Along the way, they learn all about cats.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: My Friends the Doctor
programme.desc: Time for a check-up! Barney helps his friends discover the world of doctors and dentists as they learn about healthy habits like brushing teeth, getting checkups, eating healthy foods and getting exercise.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Tea-riffic Manners
programme.desc: A tea party planned by the children turns into a fun opportunity to reinforce lessons about good manners! Throughout the day, Baby Bop is given helpful advice.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Three kids try to build a pretend farm with disastrous results because they won't work together. Barney and his friends try to cheer up Olivia.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Everybody's Got Feelings
programme.desc: Barney helps Baby Bop and BJ learn that everyone has feelings—happy, sad, angry—and sometimes all those feelings can be experienced in just one day.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Home Safe Home
programme.desc: Safety first! After learning about fire safety when a firefighter visits the caboose, Barney and his friends are inspired to do a little "safety inspection" of their own.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop is disappointed when their trip to the zoo is postponed. Barney tells Baby Bop a tale about keeping your promise.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Barney helps BJ see that we don't forget old friends when we make new ones. Ryan and his Grandpa have a great day in the Park.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Baby Bop meets a new girl named Jill who doesn’t want to join the fun.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: When Riff is asked to be captain of a baseball team, he doesn’t think he can do it. But Barney gives him the courage to try.

programme.title: Barney and Friends: Big As Barney - The Chase
programme.desc: When Ryan notices how much everyone loves Barney, he tries to be just like him; but he has a hard time filling Barney's shoes. Then Ryan learns that he is special when he's just being himself!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Real Thing
programme.desc: Allen and Ton compete with a notorious deep-pocketed bidder in Oxnard, CA, and score a vintage Coca-Cola vending machine, a vintage desk and a rare 1971 GMC truck.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Driller Instinct
programme.desc: Ton & Allen encounter aggressive outdoorsmen in the Alaskan wilderness. The guys discover an 8-wheeled ATV that travels on both land & water and an air percussion hammer that can drill through solid rock!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Friends in Hawaii Places
programme.desc: Allen &Ton enlist an assistant, Carolyn, and Allen's Hawaiian buddy, Junior, to help them battle local buyers. The guys find a WWII-era motor scooter and a stash of antique Polynesian tattoo tools that get used on Ton!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Allen's Ruff Day
programme.desc: Ton and Allen head to an auction in Ton's hometown and end up battling with a big-mouthed buyer. They discover a pair of tranquilizer dart guns and also end up fighting with a K9!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Home on the Gun Range
programme.desc: Barely making it to an auction in Corona, CA, Allen and Ton buy an overstuffed unit and find an antique crossbow, a rare 10-gauge Winchester shotgun and a 1940s Kiss-o-Meter.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Bowling Pin Payday
programme.desc: Allen & Ton visit Ton's old stompin' ground and go head-to-head with a trash-talking auction buyer. They uncover a 19th century rifle with a matching cutlass bayonet and a mechanical bowling pinsetter from the early 1960's!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Mr. Haff Goes to Washington
programme.desc: Ton and Allen invade the Nation's capital, but meet strong resistance from local bidders. The guys uncover a Civil War era black powder revolver and a stash of South African gold coins!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Auction Hunters, Ink.
programme.desc: Autographed 1960s Bob Shaw Swing Gate tattoo machine; Terry Ives competition 22hp chainsaw; six foot chainsaw-carved cedar bear.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Quadzilla Attacks!
programme.desc: Extreme Quadzilla ATV, the fastest 4 wheeler ever; a 1910s Remington Derringer and an 1880s Palm Squeezer pistol; revolutionary 1800s Western Electric telephone with a crank dial.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Big Score
programme.desc: At a climate-controlled storage facility in downtown L.A., Allen and Ton's locker wins score them an antique cash register and a German H&K pistol prized by collectors.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Great American Cashtime
programme.desc: Rare 1950s Master Pitch baseball machine; 1980s Jaws of Life tool used by rescuers to pry open cars.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Jersey Score
programme.desc: Ton & Allen attend a silent auction in NJ, but that doesn't stop the local buyers from letting them know they're not welcome! They uncover a skeet throwing machine from the 1960's & a vintage vehicle with some real horsepower!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ice, Ice, Baby
programme.desc: Ton and Allen have to get aggressive when they encounter a towering opponent with a mountain of cash. The guys uncover a vintage ice resurfacing machine and an Olympic biathlon rifle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Night of the Digging Dead
programme.desc: A custom-built shark cage; 1900s pathologist's dissection toolkit; 1940s embalming pump and one of the first electric bone saws.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hula Moola
programme.desc: Ton and Allen jet to the Hawaiian islands where they're joined by a feisty new female assistant! The team uncovers a pair of James Bond-style gadgets designed for high-speed underwater travel and a vintage sled.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Animal Instincts
programme.desc: The first pump action shotgun - a Winchester Model 1897; a hunter's collection of prize big game, full-body taxidermy.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Big Easy Money
programme.desc: Allen & Ton head to New Orleans in search of easy money, but instead encounter some bayou bidders with big-time bucks! They discover a pair of early 19th-century dueling pistols & a vintage airboat fitted with a turbine engine!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Shuffle
programme.desc: Ton and Allen teach a cocky new auction hunter a lesson. They spot a 1940's-era shuffleboard table and uncover an early hot rod made from the fuel tank of a WWII fighter plane!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Knuckle Dust
programme.desc: 1870s French Jarre Dolne Knuckle Duster revolver-knife-brass knuckle combo, a rare original George Rodrigue "Blue Dog" screenprint and a 1980 autographed Raging Bull movie poster.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Drumming Up Cash
programme.desc: Ton & Allen face some silent but deadly competition at an auction in nearby Glendale. They discover a Zildjian brand percussion cymbal from the 1940's and a pyrotechnics control board designed for large-scale fireworks displays!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gold 'n' Gloves
programme.desc: The Auction Hunters team goes toe-to-toe with Ton's evil twin! They find a medieval catapult designed for storming castles and Ton uncovers a hidden collection of gold bars worth thousands of dollars!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Hidden Hot Wheels
programme.desc: Ton and Allen challenge a big time auction buyer on his home turf. The guys uncover a 1969 Chevelle Malibu muscle car and a single-shot pistol designed to aid Allied resistance fighters during WWII.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fire in the Hole!
programme.desc: 1930s "blasting machine" dynamite detonator box; 1890s treasure chest with secret compartments. Ton smelts jewelry to forge bricks of silver.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Sidecar Surprise
programme.desc: An unassuming mom in an oversized sweater tries to pull the wool over Ton & Allen's eyes at a storage auction in Arlington, VA. The guys uncover a black powder cannon designed in the 15th century & a Russian military motorcycle!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Reel Money
programme.desc: 1970's-era Fighting Chair used for big-game fishing; military MILES "laser tag" training system.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Fake Punt Payoff
programme.desc: Ton and Allen contend with a large crowd of inexperienced auction-buyers at a huge storage container auction in Pasadena. They find a small fleet of Segway personal transporters and an enormous custom-made shotgun.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Dallas Mavericks
programme.desc: Military-grade Tomahawk cruise missile jet engine; century-old handcrafted wild west cowboy saddle; 1960s high roller's gold money.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Hot Commodity
programme.desc: Allen is late to the auction, leaving Ton to battle a feisty female auction buyer on his own! The guys find a fully functional flamethrower and a rare hand-carved bow and arrow set from South America!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Smoking Ton
programme.desc: WW2 Stuart M3 tank barrel and heavy duty tank treads; rare, collectors' 1890 silver inlayed humidor; high-end industrial meat slicer in the ultimate restaurant unit.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Money Makin' Monster Machines
programme.desc: The Auction Hunters team goes on the attack & ends up on a collision course with a hardened veteran auction buyer. They uncover a collection of speedy off-road vehicles and some hardcore heavy metal from the turn-of the-century!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gangster Whiskey
programme.desc: Allen and Ton trek to an auction in Moreno Valley, CA, where two locker wins yield a vintage jukebox, a valuable baseball card and a Prohibition-era moonshine still.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Half Pipe Dreams
programme.desc: 1970s Z-Flex Jimmy Plumer Poolrider skateboard with artwork by Doug Smith; Kevlar bulletproof vest, ballistic facemask and a helmet used by S.W.A.T. teams; a pair of 1990s racing pocket bikes capable of going 80 mph.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Disco and Dice
programme.desc: 1978 Williams Disco pinball machine; 1898 dice popper gambling device; talking 1990s bar top breathalyzer; deadly fishing harpoon.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Everything's Bigger in Texas
programme.desc: Winchester 1886 rifle invented to kill buffalo; collection of 1950s electric Slot Cars.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Gangs of New York
programme.desc: Ton and Allen duke it out with a local thrift store gang at a Brooklyn storage auction. The guys discover a classic arcade redemption game and a mid-century water cannon designed to fight towering infernos!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: The Chicago Grand Slam
programme.desc: 1984 Yamaha SS440 Snowmobile that introduced the revolutionary shock absorber suspension; rare autographed 1920s baseball glove; mint Hank Aaron signed baseball; authentic 1950s Robby the Robot collector toy.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Voodoo Moola
programme.desc: Allen & Ton hit a storage auction in Louisiana's Capitol City and quickly find themselves in trouble with the law! The guys uncover a pair of racing lawnmowers and then stumble on an antique barber chair from the early 1900s!

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Ton's Got a Gun
programme.desc: In the affluent area of Mission Hills, CA, Allen and Ton pick up an estate unit that contains a minibike, a Depression-era slot machine and an 1871 Colt revolver.

programme.title: Auction Hunters: Dead Aim
programme.desc: Ton & Allen face-off against an auction buyer with shady bidding tactics and even more questionable fashion sense. The guys find a custom-built monowheel & a rifle designed to ward off grave robbers in the early 19th century!

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: Daddy Day Care
programme.desc: Shannon and Charlie come to blows in Spain while Amber's flying high in Benidorm. Sassi is missing home, and Chloe's relationship reaches breaking point. (S4, ep6)

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: Leap Of Faith
programme.desc: Jordan gives Chloe the birthday surprise of her life! Shannon and Charlie decide to split. Sassi connects to her faith and gets a lot off her chest. Amber's birthday ends in tears. (S4, ep7)

programme.title: Teen Mom UK: Shock And Surprise
programme.desc: Jordan whisks Chloe away to Paris for a big portion of romance and snails! Shannon thinks she might be pregnant. It's a big day for Sassi, and Amber comes to a decision about Ste. (S4, ep8)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Face Off
programme.desc: Jo lashes out at Kailyn when she threatens legal action. Leah returns from treatment but things with Corey hit their boiling point. After being bailed out of jail, Jenelle must face Nathan.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Kailyn and Jo reveal some surprising news about their child support battle. Jenelle's deep issues with Nathan finally erupt and an explosive argument with Barbara sends her storming off stage.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Reunion Part 2
programme.desc: Chelsea dismisses Adam's argument to get more time with Aubree, and Adam reveals his true feelings about Cole. Leah opens up about her treatment and hashes things out with Corey and Miranda.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Unseen Moments
programme.desc: Nessa and the mums dish on never-before-seen moments and give viewers a special behind the scenes look at the past season.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Here We Go Again
programme.desc: Nathan threatens Jenelle with felony charges. Leah gets sad news about Ali while waiting to hear if she'll lose custody of the twins. Kailyn tries to rebuild her relationship with Jo.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: In the Dark
programme.desc: When Nathan takes Kaiser on an unexpected trip, Jenelle tries to charge him with kidnapping. Leah anxiously awaits word from the court but Corey receives the verdict of their custody case.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Breaking Apart
programme.desc: Leah hears the verdict of her custody case. A fight destroys Kailyn and Jo's renewed friendship. Jenelle introduces her new boyfriend to Barb. Chelsea is outraged by a post Adam puts online.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Kailyn and Javi get some bad news about his job. Leah blames Corey for confusing the girls with their new custody arrangement. Barb is concerned about Jenelle's new boyfriend.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: No Access
programme.desc: Cole has a big surprise for Chelsea. Kailyn reveals a huge secret that's been weighing on her and Javi. Jenelle is forced to face her assault charges against Nathan's girlfriend.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Leah flirts with the idea of getting back with Jeremy. Isaac struggles with Javi's impending deployment. Jenelle's birthday trip to New York turns sour after hearing from Nathan.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Man of the House
programme.desc: Javi says a tearful goodbye to his family before deployment. Jenelle meets with Nathan, fueling David's jealousy. Corey and Leah face off at Ali's doctor's appointment.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Didn't Mean It
programme.desc: Leah and Corey battle in court over custody of the twins. Jenelle agrees to let Nathan see Kaiser and David volunteers to be their contact person. Kail struggles to help Isaac.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: While You Were Out
programme.desc: Barbara and David face off over Jenelle, leading to a 911 call. Aubree gets a new accessory. Kailyn and Javi struggle with his deployment. Leah gets troubling news about custody.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Kailyn tries to repair her relationship with Vee. Some mysterious medical ailments force Jenelle to seek help in New York. Leah and Corey's co-parenting is shattered by a disturbing video. (S7, ep10)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Turn The Page
programme.desc: Jenelle's medical woes lead to a disastrous fight with Barbara. Leah and Miranda make amends. Aubree drops a big question on Adam. Kailyn rebuilds her relationship with Jo.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: An emotional meltdown over Barb ruins Jenelle's fun day with her sons. Kailyn and Javi's marriage is dangerously close to divorce. Chelsea celebrates milestones with Aubree. (S7, ep12)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Jenelle faces Nathan and his girlfriend in court for her assault trial. Aubree goes shopping for Chelsea and Cole's wedding, and Jeremy has to leave town, much to Addie and Leah's dismay. (S7, ep13)

programme.title: Teen Mom 2: Deja Vu
programme.desc: Leah struggles with Addie missing her father, Jenelle and Nathan face off in court over custody of Kaiser, and Kailyn starts summer school with some extra help from Jo.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Jazmin
programme.desc: Jazmin was a motivated teenager from a strict family. She fell in love with Dell and got pregnant at 17. Can she gain back her parents' trust and allow Dell to spend time with their baby?

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Jordan
programme.desc: Girly girl Jordan from Baltimore is kicked out by her parents when she falls pregnant by Derek. Now homeless and struggling financially, how will the young couple cope?

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Savon
programme.desc: Savon had big dreams before falling pregnant with the school's most notorious player, Ely. After being dumped while pregnant she meets a new man, but can she convince him to stick around?

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Courtney
programme.desc: Pregnant Courtney has decided to reclaim her abstinence - which leaves her boyfriend Scott feeling frustrated and alone. Will their relationship survive Courtney's born-again virgin stance?

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Savannah
programme.desc: Savannah had a difficult upbringing and relied on her boyfriend Stone for support. But after finding out she was pregnant, they soon split! Will they be able to co-parent as friends?

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Madisen
programme.desc: Madisen is a 16-year-old living in Arkansas and raised by her single dad Nick. Now that she's got a baby on the way, she's pushing her boyfriend to be at least half the dad her father is.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Rachelle
programme.desc: Rachelle's parents had big dreams for her and when she got pregnant after a month of dating her boyfriend, they were devastated. Being pregnant while getting to know the father can be hard.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Maddie
programme.desc: Maddie and her mum were best friends until Maddie met her boyfriend. Crystal sees him as a bad influence and there's tension between the two. Maddie only wants what's best for her baby.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Camryn
programme.desc: Camryn met Cam when she was 14. His personality often put him at odds with her mum, but after finding out Camryn was pregnant and losing his job due to COVID, he was forced into moving in.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Kash
programme.desc: Kash has been with boyfriend Nate for a year but struggles with his immaturity. Kash has to see if Nate can handle these new adult responsibilities or if he's just not ready to get serious.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Kali
programme.desc: Kali and Auston were shocked to get pregnant so young. Auston moved in with Kali and while Kali's parents feel they've been forced to take him in, Auston's grandparents just want him home.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Selena
programme.desc: Selena's pregnancy came as a shock to her family, especially as they didn't approve of boyfriend Sean. Selena is forced to choose between her family and the father of her child.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Shelby
programme.desc: Shelby is preparing for the birth of her baby with her ex, who already has a baby with his girlfriend. Shelby is confident she can raise her baby on her own but the future looks uncertain.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Kyla
programme.desc: Kyla has always had a complicated relationship with her mum, and things got worse when she fell pregnant. Kyla moved out to live with her aunt, while her boyfriend is living with Kyla's mum.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Abygail
programme.desc: Abygail is a gifted honours student who graduated high school two years early to pursue her bachelor's degree at age 16. So it was a shock to everyone when she found out she was pregnant.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Taylor
programme.desc: When Taylor found out she was expecting a baby with her ex Armani she was devastated. Especially since she and Armani were not even on speaking terms at the time.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Maci
programme.desc: Maci is the classic overachiever and cheerleader. Now that's all set to change as she's pregnant and planning to graduate early and move in with her boyfriend, Ryan.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Farrah
programme.desc: Meet Farrah, a popular high-school cheerleader. As if being pregnant isn't difficult enough, she is facing difficulties with the father of the baby, her friends and her mother.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Amber
programme.desc: In this episode, we follow Amber, who's expecting a baby with her boyfriend Gary. They decide to move in together but it's not always easy for these teen parents.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Ebony
programme.desc: Ebony and Josh both have dreams of joining the Air Force, but that may have to change now that Ebony is pregnant.

programme.title: 16 & Pregnant: Whitney
programme.desc: Not only is 16 year old Whitney pregnant, but so is her mother! Watch her prepare to become both a big sister and a mother.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Hostage
programme.desc: A bank robbery has Mac doing crime investigation from inside to help the robber prove he didn’t kill one of the hostages.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Veritas
programme.desc: The bank robbery saga from last season continues as Mac seeks revenge after nearly being killed by the mysterious Joe.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Page Turner
programme.desc: A free street concert quickly turns into a crime scene, the victim, in this case, has been mysteriously plagued with radiation.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Turbulence
programme.desc: Mac is traveling to Washington to testify in court until he realizes he’s in the vicinity of a murder when a stewardess finds a dead body.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Sex, Lies and Silicone
programme.desc: A very powerful woman in the world of politics is found dead leaving many desperate in hoping that her information does not get leaked out.

programme.title: CSI: NY: The Cost of Living
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate the death of a young archaeologist who may have unearthed the answer to one of New York City's oldest murder mysteries.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Enough
programme.desc: When three defendants are gunned down on the eve of their trial, Mac is forced to make good on a promise he made to a reluctant witness.

programme.title: CSI: NY: Dead Inside
programme.desc: Investigation of a floating crime scene leads the team into the world of SecretU an art-house world of true confessionals.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Pay Up
programme.desc: A group of violent kidnappers capture Robert Dunbrook's son just before he is scheduled to testify to a grand jury against his father, and the CSI team is rocked by a tragedy.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Blacklist (Featuring Gravedigger)
programme.desc: The case of a cyber killer, who appears to be targeting medical health-care workers, turns personal when the suspect invokes the name of Mac's father who had died nearly two decades earlier.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Dead Reckoning
programme.desc: While investigating the DNA from a murder scene, Hawkes discovers that the DNA is connected to more than a dozen cases over a three-state area. But does the city really have a serial killer on their hands, or is there another explanation?

programme.title: CSI: New York: Battle Scars
programme.desc: CSI investigates the homicide of a competitive street dancer, which leads the team to an unlikely killer who has a shocking motive.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Cuckoo's Nest
programme.desc: After a body falls from the 59th Street Bridge, the CSI team finds a compass near the body pointing east, and realizes it's the third victim of the Compass Killer. Meanwhile, detective Flack, still dealing with Angell's death, goes AWOL.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Manhattanhenge
programme.desc: Mac and the team lose the Compass Killer at the World's Fair site, and they soon discover through the use of astronomy and sunrises that it's only a matter of time before he targets the next victim.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Death House
programme.desc: Mummified remains are found in a booby-trapped Manhattan penthouse that has been closed off for more than 80 years, and Mac and Stella race against time to find the people who discovered the body, who are still trapped in the building.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Second Chances
programme.desc: CSI uncovers a plot to collect millions of dollars in life insurance after a reformed homeless man is found dead in an alley.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Criminal Justice
programme.desc: A murder trial is delayed and the suspect is released on bail after Stella discovers that the district attorney in the case tampered with the crime scene for personal gain.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Flag On The Play
programme.desc: When a beautiful star quarterback of the Lingerie Football League is found murdered in the locker room hot tub with traces of lidocaine in her system, the CSIs are called in to find out who wanted her dead.

programme.title: CSI: New York: The Formula
programme.desc: The team tries to figure out who rigged a race car to go up in flames and leave its legendary driver in critical condition.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Rest in Peace Marina Garito
programme.desc: Sid rules the death of a woman whose twin brother disappeared 15 years ago a suicide, but Stella is convinced that he is wrong and sets out to prove it.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Rock and a Hard Place
programme.desc: When Alexx's son becomes a suspect in a murder, saving him has dire consequences. Horatio and the CSI team must act to clear him.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Down To the Wire
programme.desc: When a man is killed due to a fake 911 call, Horatio must face off with a private investigator who is systematically destroying the team.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Going Ballistic
programme.desc: When someone is determined to take down Horatio and the CSI team, Horatio puts his life on the line in order to save his team.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: From The Grave
programme.desc: Horatio and the CSI team face off with Miami’s notorious and deadly Mala Noche gang after a funeral becomes the scene of a murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Blood in The Water
programme.desc: A family boating accident reveals a sinister plot by grifters to heist 10 million dollars in gold bars. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Prey
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a teenage girl partying in Miami on her way to the Bahamas with her high school class.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: 48 Hours to Life
programme.desc: A young man faces life in prison – and possibly worse – unless Horatio can prove his innocence against insurmountable odds.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Under Suspicion
programme.desc: Horatio and the team race against time to find out who is trying to frame Horatio for the murder of a woman he’s been dating.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Triple Threat
programme.desc: A real estate developer is murdered, and the investigation uncovers a complex web of deceit involving his wife her two identical triplet sisters. But the apparently-murdered developer may have had a surprise of his own.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Rush
programme.desc: An actor is found dead in the trunk of a stunt car, but the investigation reveals that he actually died in his room at a high-profile celebrity rehab facility.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Just Murdered
programme.desc: A far from amicable divorce comes to a bigger crisis when bodies start piling up, and Delko falls afoul of a former nemesis when he misses a payment.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Burned
programme.desc: While investigating a possible arson case, Horatio discovers that Yelina is back in Miami working as a private investigator. Meanwhile, Wolfe's prior relationship with one of the suspects gets him in hot water with his superiors.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Kill Switch
programme.desc: While CSI tries to find out who killed a carjacker, Wolfe is forced to become an adversary as he takes a job as a television crime analyst.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Dangerous Son
programme.desc: A probation officer is shot and killed, and one of the suspects turns out to be Horatio's biological son.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Cyber-Lebrity
programme.desc: An Internet celebrity's boyfriend is killed with a bow and arrow. During the case, Horatio becomes a "cyberlebrity" himself, which puts his life in danger.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Inside Out
programme.desc: Horatio goes on a manhunt to find two criminals who escaped from a prison bus after their arraignment. However, he also learns that his son's life is in danger in prison.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Deep Freeze
programme.desc: A former star pro quarterback is killed. But the investigation determines that the person who initially tried to kill him did not deliver the fatal blow.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Sunblock
programme.desc: A man is killed during an eclipse. But when a second person is killed in her home, Horatio suspects that he may be dealing with a serial killer who targets his victims only at night.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Chain Reaction
programme.desc: A model is electrocuted on a runway, and CSI discovers that the case is connected to a heroin smuggling ring involving a designer and the prisoner who held Horatio's son hostage.

programme.title: CSI: Miami: Permanent Vacation
programme.desc: A young man is shot to death in a hotel elevator, and the murder appears to have ties to a gang initiation. Meanwhile, every member of the victim's family is bent on exacting revenge on the shooter.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Devil’s Den
programme.desc: Baffled by the animal instincts of a cross country killer whose crimes seem to go dormant in winter, authorities ultimately follow his tracks to a den of deceit in the frozen tundra of Alaska.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Bitter Blade
programme.desc: When a beautiful home healthcare worker disappears, loved ones lead the search for her safe return. A series of incoming text messages reveal a soul-crushing truth and a murder most evil.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Christmas Terror
programme.desc: When a beloved couple vanishes just before their annual Christmas party, their family fears the worst – and police must do everything possible in order to solve a years-long mystery.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Aileen Wuornos: Monster Made (Part 1)
programme.desc: In 1990, Florida police were on a search for a killer. Seven men were dead, their bodies scattered along state highways. Misfit Aileen Wuornos frequented truck stops to find her victims.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Aileen Wuornos: Monster Made (Part 2)
programme.desc: In 1990, Florida police were on a search for a killer. Seven men were dead, their bodies scattered along state highways. Misfit Aileen Wuornos frequented truck stops to find her victims.

programme.title: Very Scary People: Rev. Jim Jones: Unholy Massacre (Part 1)
programme.desc: More than 900 Americans died in the jungle in Guyana in November 1978. The man responsible, Jim Jones, has gone down in history as a madman who drove his followers to suicide.

programme.title: Sins & Secrets: Greeley
programme.desc: In 2008, in Greeley, Colorado, aspiring model Angie Zapata was brutally beaten to death inside her city apartment. It was a crime rooted in deceit and betrayal.

programme.title: Sins & Secrets: Newry
programme.desc: In 2003, the police would discover three mutilated bodies in a woodpile behind Julie Bullard’s Maine inn, uncovering the dark side of this seemingly tranquil paradise.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: John 3:16
programme.desc: A man rushes his friend to the hospital with serious gunshot wounds, reporting they were robbed by strangers. When the facts don’t add up, Lt. Joe Kenda and his team go on the hunt.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Poker Face
programme.desc: A group of friends discover the corpse of entrepreneur Jamie Foster hidden under a blanket. Kenda e discovers that Foster’s business put him in close quarters with a host of unsavory characters.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: After School Special
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes when a beloved teacher is poisoned in her classroom. As doctors fight to save Barbara Lewis’ life, Lt. Joe Kenda and his team delve into her personal affairs.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Blood Sisters
programme.desc: The bullet-ridden bodies of two sisters are found in a suburban house that’s littered with mysterious clues. Joe Kenda learns that the two unassuming young mothers shared an explosive secret.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Settle the Score
programme.desc: When Johnny Crawford is killed in his easy chair, police are perplexed to learn he may have been shot over a musical instrument. It soon becomes clear the young man wasn’t killed for his own sins.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter
programme.desc: When police find 24-year-old Patrick Ray with a gunshot to the temple, the scene has all the telltale signs of suicide. But Lt. Joe Kenda's instinct says otherwise.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Death Rains Down
programme.desc: Restaurant worker Sharon Coleman is murdered in a hail of large caliber gunfire. Kenda must break through a web of lies to hunt down one of the most dangerous criminal masterminds he’s ever faced.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bring My Baby Home
programme.desc: A four-week-old girl is kidnapped, leaving her mother in anguish and police scrambling to find her. Joe Kenda and Robert Sapp fear she’s been sold on the black market… or worse.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Time Bomb
programme.desc: In 1978, Lt. Joe Kenda is new to the CSPD, and gets more than he bargains for when a local bank is the target of a massive explosion.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Raise the Dead
programme.desc: When a tip comes in suggesting foul play on a 71yr old man, Lt. Joe Kenda is left with only one way to reveal the truth: exhume the body from its grave.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: My First Case
programme.desc: In his first case with the homicide unit, rookie burglary detective Joe Kenda volunteers to work a bloody multi-victim shooting deemed “unsolvable” by the veterans.

programme.title: The Millers: Plot Twists
programme.desc: When Carol dictates that it's time to rearrange the family's positions in the Millers cemetery plot because of the two divorces.

programme.title: The Millers: The Mother Is In
programme.desc: When Carol finds out that Nathan is seeing a therapist, she secretly makes an appointment for herself in order to find out what's going on.

programme.title: The Millers: Giving The Bird
programme.desc: It's Halloween, and Nathan, Debbie, and Adam take Mikayla trick-or-treating to the house of an old woman who everyone in the neighborhood thinks is a witch.

programme.title: The Millers: Driving Miss Crazy
programme.desc: When Nathan gets frustrated after he's forced to drive Carol around town for errands once again, he demands that she either learn how to drive or find another chauffeur.

programme.title: The Millers: Internet Dating
programme.desc: When Nathan helps Carol set up her profile on an Internet dating site, he and Ray get so excited about one of her potential suitors, they start corresponding with him, pretending to be Carol.

programme.title: The Millers: You're In Trouble
programme.desc: When Nathan learns why Debbie is Tom's favorite child instead of him, he decides it's time to fill his parents in on some of Debbie's childhood secrets.

programme.title: The Millers: The Talk
programme.desc: When Carol finds out that Tom never had "the talk" with Nathan about the birds and the bees, she insists it's not too late to gather the family together and do it now.

programme.title: The Millers: Carol's Parents Are Coming to Town
programme.desc: When Carol's overbearing mother and father announce they're coming to visit for Christmas, Carol recruits Nate and Tom to cover up their failed relationships and present a happy facade.
programme.sub-title: Carol's Parents Are Coming to Town

programme.title: The Millers: Dear Diary
programme.desc: When Debbie suspects Nathan and Carol of secretly reading her diary, she and Adam plant a fake entry about Tom in order to prove it. Ernie Hudson guest stars.

programme.title: The Millers: Miller's Mind
programme.desc: Nathan learns to appreciate Carol's incessant rants after he mimics one of them at work and is rewarded with his own news segment to complain on the air.

programme.title: The Millers: Carol's Surprise
programme.desc: Nathan is determined to finally, just once, surprise the "unsurpriseable" Carol on her birthday. Brandon Routh guest stars.

programme.title: The Millers: You Betcha
programme.desc: Nathan asks Tom to spend the weekend with him in the hopes of finding something they have in common.

programme.title: The Millers: Bahama Mama
programme.desc: Just as Nathan begins to unwind on his vacation in the Bahamas, Carol's surprise appearance gets him riled up all over again until they meet Ganja Pete.

programme.title: The Millers: Tomlandia
programme.desc: When Nathan pitches a children's show to his boss, Ed Dolan, based on Tom's imaginary comic book, Tom has an adverse reaction to the tweaks made to his cherished world. Jeffrey Tambor guest stars.

programme.title: The Millers: Plus One
programme.desc: Nathan's excitement at scoring a ticket for himself and a guest to a dinner with President Obama turns to dread when he has to pick one of his family members to be his "plus one."

programme.title: The Millers: Walk-n-Wave
programme.desc: Worried that his mother has made him feel like he's better than other people, Nathan befriends a hopeless co-worker, Doug, who turns out to be a social outcast and more than Nathan knows how to handle.

programme.title: The Millers: Cancellation Fee
programme.desc: Nathan tries to date his mother's dentist in secret after Carol adds her to the Miller Family Blacklist for charging her a $75 cancellation fee for being late to her appointment.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly, over the moon, introduces the gang to her new boyfriend, Congressman Charles Hayward, but they soon begin to question his motives.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly’s engagement to Congressman Charles Hayward is put in jeopardy when a scandalous photo of her lands in the newspaper. Haskell has an idea for a great new app, but needs an investor.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly's big day arrives. Haskell and Nicki, now business partners, strike it rich.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly is given a voice-activated operating system as a gift and gets way too attached to him. Haskell comes into money and uses it to control Phil and Stuart.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly, tired of all the drama that comes with dating, decides to only pursue men she’s not interested in. Haskell takes all his money out of the bank to show it off.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Stuart recruits Phil for his a cappella group and Phil leads a rebellion. Haskell leaves Holly out of his will and she seeks revenge.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Stuart’s sister Nicki comes back from her European vacation with a female lover. Holly, inspired by Nicki, decides to try dating women.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil’s stint on a movie set leads to romance with the female star. Holly struggles with having to fire someone for the first time.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil makes a big mistake on his first date with a movie star so Holly has to infiltrate the red carpet to bail him out. Stuart and Haskell compete over who can get the most Twitter followers.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly and Nicki plan a girls’ night out, but wind up competing for the same guy. Phil realizes dating a movie star is much more difficult than he imagined.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil and Stuart have a fight with Haskell and he moves out. Holly, desperate to keep them all together, sends Phil and Stuart to bring him home.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly accidently convinces Stuart to quit his dental practice and buy a restaurant. Haskell, sick of paying alimony, tries to persuade his ex wife Margo to marry her fiancé.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Stuart and Holly convince Margo to hold her wedding at their restaurant. Haskell, still desperately in love with Margo, tries to stop it.

programme.title: The Exes: A Little Romance
programme.desc: Phil (Donald Faison) uses Holly’s assistant to help him land a star jockey as a client, but he’s got his eyes on a bigger prize. Haskell (Wayne Knight) talks Stuart into selling sentimental mementos from his marriage but Stuart has trouble letting go.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Haskell (Wayne Knight) panics when his online girlfriend surprises him with a visit, because he used Phil’s (Donald Faison) picture as his own. Holly discovers a homeless man in the laundry room and learns appearances can be very deceiving.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Stuart’s (David Alan Basche) work life is turned upside down when Phil (Donald Faison) sleeps with his dental assistant. Holly (Kristen Johnston) lends Eden (Kelly Stables) some outfits and soon discovers her clothes have a better social life than her.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: When Stuart’s favorite restaurant is about to close, he takes Phil along for one last meal, only to bump into Phil’s ex-wife who is now engaged. Holly is baffled by mixed signals from a cute co-worker. Haskell starts an online traffic school.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly (Kristen Johnston), determined to find Stuart (David Alan Basche) a date, introduces him to a woman who turns out to be a true professional. Haskell (Wayne Knight) invents a fabulous online lifestyle for himself in order to one-up his ex-wife.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil (Donald Faison) meets a foreign lingerie model who doesn’t speak English and Stuart (David Alan Basche) has to act as interpreter. Eden helps Holly overcome a bad first impression with a handsome neighbor. Haskell buys a coffin as an investment.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil (Donald Faison), Stuart (David Alan Basche), and Haskell (Wayne Knight) are forced to trade apartments with Holly (Kristen Johnston) when her mother (Judith Light) comes for a visit because Holly never told her mother her engagement ended months ago.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Miss England
programme.desc: Dani's excitement at being promoted is cut short when Oscar tasks her with the daunting job of hiring her own replacement.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: Eisen Trouble
programme.desc: Oscar tries to outsmart his nemesis, Rich Eisen, after he is forced to present him with a humanitarian award.

programme.title: The Odd Couple: The Odd Couples
programme.desc: Oscar and Felix seek the advice of a counselor in their apartment building to help overcome their issues.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda tries to tie cousins back together who are at the end of their rope when expensive rock climbing equipment seems to fall off a cliff.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 12
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda faces a clash of biblical proportion when a Pastor claims his sister stole $5,000 from his church.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 81
programme.desc: Sisters who only found each other when they were grown up are now at war over merchandise one "grabs real quick" from the other's boutique and Judge Rhonda has to settle the tab.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 82
programme.desc: Designer sunglasses that look really "fly" divide two cousins, inseparable since birth, because they might be fake; Judge Rhonda shines sunlight on the truth.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: When a dad takes a fancy, fast car from his son's car lot to take a lady friend on a 100 mph joy ride two of them dead end in front of Judge Rhonda.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 107
programme.desc: Brothers ask Judge Rhonda for a DNA test to determine whether the man who died shielding them from gunfire was the biological father to both of them.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 84
programme.desc: When her comedian cousin brings a lady friend to her home recording studio for a drunken "play session," the damage done is no laughing matter for Judge Rhonda.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 35
programme.desc: Foster care sisters who look after each other, work together at the same strip club and live together end up in Judge Rhonda's court over a car accident that might have been caused by drinking on the job.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: Two cousins, Westside and Scoob, bring a car that looks like a shark bit the front bumper into Judge Rhonda's court with a mystery story about how the damage occured.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: A couple in crisis comes to Judge Rhonda's court looking for answers about co-parenting their children after drugs, alcohol and infidelity have poisoned their relationship.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 98
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda settles the score when the parties, trash, liquor bottles and cigarette butts that ruined Grandma's house caused such a ruckus that neighbors had to call the police.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 38
programme.desc: Before heading to jail one sister arranged for her huge tax return to be deposited into her sister's bank account and that money's disappearance leads this family to Judge Rhonda.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda faces sisters in crisis over one's homelessness and addiction to pain pills and the other's hopeless effort to help.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 123
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda faces cousins at odds over a house party with a stripper that got way out of hand.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 36
programme.desc: An Aunt, who has been like a second mother, drags her nephew into Judge Rhonda's court over a car he claims she stole from him.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda is on the case of a trip to a NYC flea market that turns ugly when one cousin claims the prices were too high, and blames her host for expensive damage to her car.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 16
programme.desc: A shady Food Truck deal drives cousins into Judge Rhonda's Courtroom.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 2
programme.desc: Burned wedding pictures and a mess of clothes dumped in the woods bring a married couple on the rocks into Judge Rhonda's Courtroom.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 148
programme.desc: A younger sister hauls her older brother to Judge Rhonda's court to get him to pay back the many bar tabs she has paid when she's had to pick him up drunk from various bars around his college.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 68
programme.desc: When the cousin they grew up with and his girlfriend back out of the house these four were going to rent together just before the move in date, Judge Rhonda must decide who ran afoul of detrimental reliance.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 136
programme.desc: The family rumor mill whispering about a gambling problem turns a loan into a bad bet and drives close cousins since Kindergarten into Judge Rhonda's court.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 45
programme.desc: An expensive boozy cruise lands blended sisters in Judge Rhonda's court over money that might be payback or might be a loan.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 140
programme.desc: Brothers face Judge Rhonda through the lens of a broken camera that the younger one claims the older brother destroyed on an alcohol-fueled day at the lake.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 27
programme.desc: Cousins clash over a broken pullout bed, sleeping crooked and stolen diet pills today in Judge Rhonda's court.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: A complicated car deal drives two cousins into Judge Rhonda's courtroom when credit scores and the "need" for a bling vehicle crash into financial reality.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 72
programme.desc: When the rescue horse Annie who saved this sister's life is attacked by her step-sister's Great Dane, Judge Rhonda saddles up to mend fences between these two animal lovers.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 89
programme.desc: A fraudulent check stamps a stop payment on a 40 year friendship and working relationship with sketchy circumstances that has Judge Rhonda smelling a con.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 92
programme.desc: A brother on the lam from an arrest warrant that landed him in jail for 32 months blames his sister for the loss of all of his worldly possessions and Judge Rhonda has a chat with his mother about pulling this family back together.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 86
programme.desc: When an ex-boyfriend's ex attacks her cousin's car, the woman facing Judge Rhonda wishes she had gone to the store instead of this dude's house for a glass of wine.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 109
programme.desc: Judge Rhonda tries to close the gap between two close cousins argue over Major, the pure bread Doberman that one was going to send to stud and the other got neutered.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 19
programme.desc: A car note and flirting drives a wedge between two married women; can Judge Rhonda build back the trust?

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: His older sister bailed him out of jail after he was jumped by three guys and he tells Judge Rhonda that he doesn't need to pay her back because he had two other friends who would have bailed him out for free.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 83
programme.desc: Cousins who were like sisters claim one social media post has put a fork in their relationship and want Judge Rhonda to decide if the damage can be repaired.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 67
programme.desc: Cousins who are partners in business part ways over a loan in a casino; lady luck walked away and Judge Rhonda steps in.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 32
programme.desc: Bullying and an old family vehicle drive two once-estranged cousins apart again, causing them to crash into Judge Rhonda's courtroom.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 43
programme.desc: Close cousins face Judge Rhonda over a bail bond loan when one got arrested twice for aggravated assault.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: It's a real dogfight when cousins clash over who gets to keep adorable pooch Odie; and Judge Rhonda recruits a local deputy to deliver the dog whichever way she rules.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 1
programme.desc: Family helps family, but when child's play turns destructive Judge Rhonda must decide who will pay.

programme.title: Relative Justice
programme.desc: Handy work turns into a handy excuse when the favorite Uncle claims a huge sum of money was a gift; his favorite nephew is so opposed to this opinion the he drags them to Judge Rhonda's courtroom.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 26
programme.desc: One sister's Hot Girl Summer was more important to her than paying rent, so the other sister drags them both to Judge Rhonda.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 71
programme.desc: Two sisters have carried the trauma of their father's tragic death since childhood and it's tearing them apart; now a damaged truck leads them to Judge Rhonda who clears a path for them to move forward.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 15
programme.desc: A dutiful Daughter pays for most of her Mother's husbands funeral and Judge Rhonda decides who owes for the balance.

programme.title: Relative Justice: Episode 94
programme.desc: A mother of nine who pulled herself up by her bootstraps to get a degree and start a non-profit to benefit young mom's drags her oldest son to Judge Rhonda's Court over her loan to start his own record label.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Table Stakes
programme.desc: At a swanky fundraiser, attended by the sheriff, a woman turns up dead in the pool.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Two Tough To Die
programme.desc: A woman is abducted from a mall parking garage. She's raped, beaten, shot and left for dead. Sara collects evidence from her and grows attached to her.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Face Lift
programme.desc: A body is found in a pottery store in what's apparently a robbery that was interrupted.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: $35K O.B.O
programme.desc: A couple leaving a restaurant on their anniversary are killed in the street and their car is stolen. The crime scene is compromised when it rains shortly after the CSIs arrive.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Gentle, Gentle
programme.desc: The entire team investigates the abduction of the infant child of a well-to-do family. Suspicion immediately falls on the child's parents.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Sounds Of Silence
programme.desc: Two teenage girls run over a deaf man with their car, but they didn't kill him - he was already dead.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Justice Is Served
programme.desc: Grissom, Nick, and Warrick take the case of a jogger who was killed by a wild animal in the park. It gets complicated when they discover that the jogger had his liver removed after he was killed.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Evaluation Day
programme.desc: On the day Grissom has to evaluate his team, a head is found in the trunk of a car. While Gil and Catherine work on the head, Sara and Nick investigate a body in the desert that's missing its head.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Cross-jurisdictions
programme.desc: An ex-CSI chief is murdered in his house after a wild party for the rich and famous. His wife and young daughter are taken hostage in Miami. Catherine and Warrick follow the trail and work with Caine and his team to solve the case

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: The Hunger Artist
programme.desc: The body of a woman is found in a shopping cart, wrapped in a blanket with her mutilated face protruding out. The woman was a model named Ashley James whose face can be found all over Las Vegas, on billboards and magazine covers.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Revenge Is Best Served Cold
programme.desc: A world-famous poker champion drops dead in the middle of a game. He appears to have had a heart attack. Outside of the city, Nick and Catherine investigate the death of a young street racer.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: The Accused Is Entitled
programme.desc: Hollywood sex symbol Tom Haviland admits to having sex with a girl who is found dead in his casino hotel bedroom with her throat fatally pierced with a corkscrew. His lawyer demands a near-instant trial, leaving CSI almost no time to work.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Let The Seller Beware
programme.desc: The owners of a house placed on sale are found dead, their bodies discovered by two interested buyers. Sara is working solo on the death of a cheerleader at a high school.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: A Little Murder
programme.desc: A dwarf is found dead, hanged in an auditorium during an annual convention for little people. Working on a case of murder during a home invasion, Catherine is attacked by the perpetrator while processing the scene.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Abra Cadaver
programme.desc: During a magic show, a female participant really disappears during a disappearing act. Nick and Catherine investigates the death of a rock star found on his tour bus with a needle stuck in his arm.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Fight Night
programme.desc: When boxing favourite LaRoi Steele dies during the Fight Night against Javier Molina, Grissom investigates for a possible murder. Meanwhile, Nick is assigned to work solo on a jewelry heist.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Snuff
programme.desc: A murder is caught on tape. With no body or a crime scene, Sara, Warrick and Catherine must get as much information as possible from the grainy 16 mm film. Grissom and Nick must brave a colony of fire ants to recover a body.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Blood Lust
programme.desc: A taxi driver accidentally runs over a teenage boy. He is later brutally beaten by a gang who thinks he is running away. Grissom and Sara works on the case and finds that the boy was dead prior to being hit from a stab wound.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: High And Low
programme.desc: A body falls out of the sky, literally. The cause of death is suffocation but the body bears no signs of strangulation.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Random Acts Of Violence
programme.desc: Matt Phelps sends his two kids to bed when, out of the blue, there is a drive-by shooting and his daughter Aimee is shot and killed in her bed. Grissom learns that Phelps is Warrick's mentor and friend.

programme.title: Murder Book
programme.desc: Investigators join forces with the family of a missing retiree in order to unravel the mystery of his disappearance. They eventually bring his killers to justice.

programme.title: Voice of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Jennifer Pan witnessed the murder of her mother and the attempted murder of her father. But when he wakes from a coma, her father has a very different story to tell.

programme.title: Voice of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: When a criminal on probation embarks on a killing spree of ex-lovers, police try to get ahead of the man who will later insist that he is a victim and that society is to blame.

programme.title: Voice of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: How do the FBI find a killer with no victim or geographic profile and who covers his trail with counter forensics. And if they can find him, how would they prove responsibility?

programme.title: The Truth About My Murder
programme.desc: Dr Richard Shepherd investigates the murders of Sam Herr and Julie Kibuishi, both shot for financial gain by a former theatre actor who was planning an expensive wedding despite being deeply in debt.

programme.title: The Truth About My Murder
programme.desc: Dr Richard Shepherd investigates the 2013 murder of taxi driver William Spiller, who was brutally stabbed to death before being dismembered and stored in boxes that were used as a TV stand.

programme.title: The Truth About My Murder
programme.desc: Dr Richard Shepherd investigates the case of 23-year-old Marta Ligman, a delicatessen worker who was found in a suitcase in London's Grand Union Canal after being attacked in 2015.

programme.title: The Truth About My Murder
programme.desc: Dr Richard Shepherd investigates the 1997 murder of Dawn Hacheney, whose husband set fire to their family home in Washington State, hoping the blaze would be treated as an accident.

programme.title: The Real Prime Suspect
programme.desc: Former DCI Jackie Malton looks into the case of British au-pair Louise Woodward, after a child she was looking after had been rushed to a hospital unresponsive.

programme.title: The Real Prime Suspect
programme.desc: Former DCI Jackie Malton interviews experts, learning how they joined forces to identify the skeleton of a woman no-one even knew was missing, and how her killer was brought to justice.

programme.title: Facing Evil
programme.desc: Kimberly Parker is convicted of masterminding the kidnapping and murder of her estranged husband. She is sentenced to 99 years in prison.

programme.title: Facing Evil
programme.desc: Twila Busby and her two sons are found dead in their home in Texas. Her boyfriend Hank Skinner is found guilty, but he claims he is innocent.

programme.title: Facing Evil
programme.desc: An elderly lady and her care taker are murdered. Earl Linebaugh and Melissa Harris are sentenced to life with no parole, but Melissa says she's a victim too.

programme.title: Facing Evil
programme.desc: 21-year-old Ernesto Martinez had been seemingly living happily with 59-year-old Barry Horn - until one of them was found brutally stabbed to death at their home.

programme.title: Facing Evil
programme.desc: In 1986 the body of Patrice LaBlanc surfaces in a Texas Lake. She's been stabbed 39 times by her drag queen boyfriend Cliff Youens. Now he confesses to his crimes.

programme.title: Facing Evil
programme.desc: Baby Dylan was 3 months old when his mum shook him to death. She claims it was an accident but was found guilty of murder and sentenced to 50 years.

programme.title: Facing Evil
programme.desc: It took police 10 years to unravel a convoluted murder-for-hire plot involving three junkies and a callous hit man, which resulted in a life imprisonment sentence.

programme.title: Facing Evil
programme.desc: Electrician Larry Swearingen is found guilty of the murder of 19 year-old college student Melissa Trotter and now sits on death row. He says he didn't do it.

programme.title: Facing Evil
programme.desc: Tyra Whitney killed her daughter Tashira's boyfriend, LeMarcus Bell,with a hammer. LeMarcus died from his injuries shortly, and Tyra faced incarceration.

programme.title: Facing Evil
programme.desc: Stephen Schulhoff was found beaten to death. His daughter Courtney and her boyfriend are found guilty and sentenced to life with no parole, but it's not clear who was responsible.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: When Michael Barber finds his wife Susan in bed with another man, she realises she has to take drastic measures to stop him leaving, but no one could suspect how far she would go.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: Brian Bishop was shot and killed in a shoot-out with an armed robber as they returned to a stash point piled high with cash stolen from multiple post offices along the coastline.
programme.sub-title: Murdered in the Line of Duty

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: Just before Christmas 1994, heavily tattooed Jason Mitchell strangled pensioners Arthur and Shirley Wilson, before returning to his father's house and dismembering his body.

programme.title: Murder by the Sea
programme.desc: Roger and Josie Hartland found themselves stalked by their new homes previous owner, a former resident of a Nazi breeding camp, producing a litany of children for Hitler's Aryan race.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: Tank in a Vineyard
programme.desc: Suggs and Stephen continue their hunt for buried WWII treasure, and discover a tank buried in a vineyard.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: Top Secret Arms Depot
programme.desc: In Weedon Bec, Suggs and Stephen unearth a wealth of WW2 relics as they uncover the very secret past of a top secret arms supply depot.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: 82nd Airborne and German POWs
programme.desc: Suggs and Stephen go in search of relics from the United States' elite 82nd airborne infantry division.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: Spitfire
programme.desc: Treasure Hunters Suggs and Stephen Taylor are on the trail of an iconic Mark IX Spitfire in Belgium.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: American Bombers in Suffolk
programme.desc: In WW2, Suffolk was home to 32 airfields that served as stations for US bombers. Suggs and Stephen hunt for relics of the visiting aircraft.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: Forgotten Bomber
programme.desc: The WW2 Treasure Hunters are in Northern France looking for the remains of an RAF Fairey Battle bomber plane shot down during the days after Dunkirk.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: D-Day Undercover
programme.desc: Suggs and WW2 expert Stephen uncover more historical finds across the UK, this time looking for relics of the 1944 D-Day operation.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: Pathfinder
programme.desc: The WW2 Treasure Hunters are in Cambridgeshire on the former airbase of the Pathfinders Force - the elite flying team whose WW2 exploits were kept top secret.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: Bomb Factory
programme.desc: Suggs and Stephen are back on the hunt for more relics from World War 2, and hope searching the site of a bomb factory won't yield anything too explosive.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: D-Day Dress Rehearsal
programme.desc: In 1944, the south-west of England was packed with American troops training for D-Day. Suggs and Stephen discover more about this friendly invasion.

programme.title: WW2 Treasure Hunters: American Fly Boys
programme.desc: Suggs and WW2 militaria expert Stephen Taylor bring forgotten stories of World War II back to life by unearthing artefacts from sites across the UK.

programme.title: Hitler's War: The Fall Of France
programme.desc: The Fall of France: By May 1940, Europe had been at war for nine months. Yet Britain and France declared war on Germany in September 1939 following Hitler's attack on Poland.

programme.title: Hitler's War: The Battle Of Britain
programme.desc: The Battle of Britain: Taking place between August and September 1940, The Battle of Britain remains one of the most famous battles of World War Two.

programme.title: Hitler's War: Desert War
programme.desc: Desert War: Hitler turns his tanks towards Russia. After a succession of devastating victories, the Germans delay and the fierce Russian winter takes a grip.

programme.title: Hitler's War: Stalingrad
programme.desc: Stalingrad: The Battle of Stalingrad is considered by many historians to be the turning point in World War Two in Europe, where the German army was bled dry in Russia.

programme.title: Hitler's War: Normandy to The Rhine
programme.desc: Normandy To The Rhine: The Western Allies of World War II launched the largest amphibious invasion in history when they assaulted Normandy, on 6 June 1944.

programme.title: Hitler's War: The Battle For Berlin
programme.desc: The Battle for Berlin: An insight into secret Nazi attempts to turn the tide of war as Berlin crumbled.

programme.title: Weeks Of War: Episode 1
programme.desc: A look at what it was really like to live and survive during one of the most devastating conflicts the world has ever seen.

programme.title: Weeks Of War: Episode 2
programme.desc: Between September 1940 and November 1941, things intensify as Nazi Germany exert their dominance over Europe.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Creatures From Hell
programme.desc: Share the terror of women and children who are stalked by fiendish beings.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor
programme.desc: Watch harrowing tales of supernatural beings who are bent on causing pain.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Dream Home Nightmares
programme.desc: Visit a haunted inn and a dream home that turns into a living nightmare.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: When Ghosts Get Physical
programme.desc: Witness a poltergeist become aggressive while a ghost makes a deadly return.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Tormented Teens
programme.desc: Witness terrifying apparitions, and see one woman’s horrible dreams come true.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Messages From Beyond
programme.desc: A man encounters spirits in his dreams, and a teen deals with demonic messages.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Multiple Spirit Disorder
programme.desc: Watch as spirits and shadowy figures plague three different family’s lives.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: A Sense of Evil
programme.desc: Hear from terrified people who wish their sixth sense wasn’t quite so good.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Return of the Dead
programme.desc: Tour a haunted house and see the deadly outcome of a spirit’s search for family.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Tormented By Shadows
programme.desc: Know true fear when you hear three eerie stories about vengeful spirits.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Possessed
programme.desc: A teen’s risky ghost fixation grows, while a war vet almost destroys a family.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Dark Dreams
programme.desc: Meet people who been haunted and hurt by real demons in terrifying nightmares.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: When Ghosts Speak
programme.desc: An evil spirit tells a woman to leave her home, and a ghost gets jealous.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: When Spirits Take Over
programme.desc: Meet a possessed young woman and visit a spell-bound boutique.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor
programme.desc: Hear frightening stories of hauntings that become dangerously violent.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Renos from Hell
programme.desc: Discover why a mansion was so cheap, and meet a spooky entity in a basement.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Territorial Ghosts
programme.desc: Witness the terror that ensues when ghosts deal with invaders on their turf.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor: Bringing In Evil
programme.desc: Meet a couple who invite spirits into their home through their nursery.

programme.desc: Learn how three families are dealing with properties overrun by ghosts.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Weekend Warriors
programme.desc: Tuna.com continues its winning streak, catching two fish in one day while the rest of the fleet struggles to even find a spot to fish in between the weekend recreational boaters.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Size Matters
programme.desc: Meet Kevin and the Christina, a boat that gets its own real-life fish story when it snags an 1,100-pound \\"monstah\\" right out of the gate.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Greed, Ego & Jealousy
programme.desc: After watching the Christina catch the biggest tuna of the season, the uber-competitive Captain Dave of the Tuna.com is obsessed with beating the record, and catching a fish bigger than 1,075 lbs!

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Mann gegen Sturm
programme.desc: Marciano, captain of Hard Merchandise, risks the elements to hook a giant bluefin and finds himself with boat trouble in the midst of the storm.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Mutiny at Sea
programme.desc: A mixture of bad luck and mutiny brews in this tumultuous episode of Wicked Tuna. Tensions erupt on New England's top tuna boat, Tuna.Com, when Captain Dave and Paul get into a heated confrontation that causes Paul to quit!

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Grudge Match
programme.desc: With just two weeks left until the end of tuna fishing season, Bounty Hunter gains a new deckhand.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Captain Ralph in Not
programme.desc: A hard season with little money to show has taken its toll on the crew of the Odysea, leading Captain Ralph to lash out at his first mate Pirate.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Good to the Last Bite
programme.desc: As the final week of tuna fishing begins, the Hard Merchandise, the Bounty Hunter, the Tuna.Com and the Odysea steam out together, each captain vowing to catch the biggest tuna before the season ends.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Bite is On
programme.desc: Meet the fleet, as peak season begins and the adrenaline rush of \\"monstah\\" hunting hits Gloucester.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Payback's a Fish
programme.desc: After going bust on his last trip and coming home empty-handed, Marciano of Hard Merchandise now wrestles with the trials of being a husband and father who has to be away from home so often.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Weekend Warriors
